items.title_en: The newest Instagram “exploit” is the goofiest I've seen
items.title_zh: Instagram 最新漏洞是我见过的最离谱的
items.summary_en: Instagram's latest vulnerability demonstrates an embarrassingly simple route to an account takeover, exposing gaps in auth flows. The incident highlights how even large platforms struggle with secure access controls and abuse monitoring.
items.summary_zh: 最新的 Instagram 漏洞暴露出一个极其简单的账号接管路径，凸显身份验证流程的薄弱。即使是大平台也难免在防护和滥用监测方面出现漏洞。

items.title_en: They’re made out of weights
items.title_zh: 它们是由权重构成的
items.summary_en: Some systems are described as being fundamentally built from weights.
items.summary_zh: 有些系统被描述为本质上由权重构成。

items.title_en: S&P 500 rejects SpaceX, also blocking entry for OpenAI and Anthropic
items.title_zh: 标准普尔500拒绝 SpaceX 入选，也不放行 OpenAI 与 Anthropic
items.summary_en: The piece explains how the S&P 500 committee handles inclusion, and why SpaceX was not added while OpenAI and Anthropic face similarly restrictive considerations. It highlights how profitability, scale, and market categorization influence access to major indices, shaping AI firms’ market visibility.
items.summary_zh: 文章解释了标普500 的入选标准与流程，为何 SpaceX 未被纳入、OpenAI 与 Anthropic 面临相似的限制。指出盈利能力、规模与市场分类如何影响进入主要指数，从而影响 AI 公司的市场知名度。

items.title_en: Gmail thinks I'm stupid, so I left
items.title_zh: Gmail 觉得我很蠢，所以我离开
items.summary_en: A writer explains leaving Gmail after experiences with AI-powered features and UX choices that felt intrusive.
items.summary_zh: 作者在体验到 Gmail 的 AI 功能和设计带来的侵入感后选择离开。文章讨论用户对 AI 助手驱动的邮箱服务的抵触情绪，以及隐私、控制权与 UX 设计之间的权衡。

items.title_en: Gemma 4 12B: A unified, encoder-free multimodal model
items.title_zh: Gemma 4 12B：一个统一的无需编码器的多模态模型
items.summary_en: Gemma 4 12B is Google's encoder-free, unified multimodal model designed to handle text, image, and other modalities with a single architecture. By removing dedicated encoders, it aims to simplify training and inference while enabling more flexible cross-modal tasks. This approach could lower engineering friction for developers building multimodal applications.
items.summary_zh: Gemma 4 12B 是谷歌推出的无编码器、统一的多模态模型，能够用同一架构处理文本、图像等模态。取消独立编码器的设计旨在简化训练和推理，为跨模态任务带来更大的灵活性。此类设计若成熟，可能降低多模态应用的工程门槛。

items.title_en: SpaceX, Other Mega IPOs Denied Fast Index Entry by S&P
items.title_zh: SpaceX 与其他 Mega IPO 被 S&P 拒绝快速指数入口
items.summary_en: S&P Dow Jones kept the existing fast-entry rules for megacap IPOs, meaning SpaceX and other large offerings won't automatically get quicker index inclusion. The decision shapes index visibility and trading dynamics for blockbuster IPOs.
items.summary_zh: 标准普尔继续维持大型 IPO 的快速进入规则，SpaceX 等巨型上市不会自动获得更快的指数纳入。此决定影响指数追踪与巨型 IPO 的市场可见度。

items.title_en: Elixir v1.20: Now a gradually typed language
items.title_zh: Elixir v1.20：逐步类型化语言
items.summary_en: Elixir 1.20 introduces gradual typing, letting developers opt into type checks without breaking dynamic code. This enables stronger tooling and safer APIs while preserving Elixir’s flexible, productive vibe.
items.summary_zh: Elixir 1.20 引入渐进式类型系统，开发者可以在不强制改动现有动态代码的前提下逐步打上类型标记。这提升工具链的准确性，帮助接口设计更安全，同时保留 Elixir 的灵活与高效开发体验。

items.title_en: Please don't spam people looking for employment. It's just cruel
items.title_zh: 请勿骚扰正在找工作的人，这太残忍
items.summary_en: Spamming people who are actively seeking employment is harmful and counterproductive. The piece argues for respectful, consent-based outreach by recruiters and offers practical guidelines to avoid wasting candidates’ time.
items.summary_zh: 向正在找工作的人进行垃圾式联系不仅令人厌恶，而且浪费求职者时间。文章呼吁招聘方采用有同意的、定向的沟通，并给出避免干扰的实用建议。

items.title_en: LLMs are eroding my software engineering career and I don't know what to do
items.title_zh: 大型语言模型正在侵蚀我的软件工程职业生涯，我不知道该怎么办
items.summary_en: A software engineer voices concern that LLMs are eroding the profession, prompting a re-think of skill sets. Practical responses include leaning into AI-assisted design and architecture, or shifting toward areas where human judgment remains essential.
items.summary_zh: 一位软件工程师表达担忧：大型语言模型正在侵蚀这个职业，促使重新考量个人的技能组合。可行的应对路径包括更深入利用 AI 辅助的设计/架构工作，或转向需要人类判断的领域。

items.title_en: How LLMs work
items.title_zh: 大型语言模型如何工作
items.summary_en: A clear primer on how LLMs function, covering tokenization, transformer architectures, training objectives, and scaling laws. It also notes common caveats like the gap between statistical patterns and grounded reasoning that matter for evaluating real-world AI systems.
items.summary_zh: 对大型语言模型如何工作提供清晰入门，涵盖分词、Transformer 架构、训练目标与规模效应，并点出现实世界中需警惕的误区，如统计模式与实际推理之间的差距。

items.title_en: Changing how we develop Ladybird
items.title_zh: 改变我们开发 Ladybird 的方式
items.summary_en: The post outlines a shift in how the Ladybird project is developed, focusing on new workflows, tooling, and contributor practices to accelerate iteration while maintaining quality. It explains the rationale behind changing development dynamics and what readers might expect in future releases. The change aims to improve collaboration, transparency, and build reliability for users and contributors alike.
items.summary_zh: 该文阐述对 Ladybird 项目开发方式的变革，聚焦新的工作流、工具链和贡献者实践，旨在在保持质量的同时加快迭代速度。文中解释了改变开发动力学的理由，以及未来版本释放中可能出现的变化。此举旨在提升协作、透明度和对用户及贡献者的可靠性。

items.title_en: Failing grades soar with AI usage, dwindling math skills in Berkeley CS classes
items.title_zh: AI 使用激增导致伯克利计算机系课程不及格率攀升，数学能力下降
items.summary_en: Berkeley CS instructors report a spike in failing grades as AI usage increases in coursework, accompanied by a perceived decline in math skills among students. The trend underscores a broader tension between AI-assisted learning and mastery of fundamentals, suggesting the need for new assessment methods and curriculum adjustments.
items.summary_zh: 随着 AI 在课程中的使用增加，伯克利计算机科学课程的不及格率攀升，数学基础能力也在下降。这一现象凸显了 AI 辅助学习与基础知识掌握之间的张力，促使课程设计和评估方式需要改革。

items.title_en: Artificial intelligence is not conscious – Ted Chiang
items.title_zh: 人工智能并非具备意识——Ted Chiang
items.summary_en: Ted Chiang argues that current AI lacks true consciousness and subjective experience; he distinguishes between sophisticated pattern recognition and genuine sentience. The piece further explores ethical and policy implications, urging careful framing of AI capabilities and responsibilities.
items.summary_zh: Ted Chiang 认为当前的人工智能并非真正具备意识或主观体验；它们只是高度复杂的模式识别系统。文章还讨论伦理与政策含义，呼吁对 AI 能力与责任进行谨慎界定。

items.title_en: Malicious npm packages detected across Red Hat Cloud Services
items.title_zh: Red Hat 云服务中检测到恶意 npm 包
items.summary_en: Security researchers detected malicious npm packages circulating inside Red Hat Cloud Services, underscoring ongoing supply‑chain risks in the npm ecosystem. The episode reinforces the importance of dependency hygiene, reproducible builds, and source provenance checks for cloud environments.
items.summary_zh: 安全团队在 Red Hat Cloud Services 内发现恶意 npm 包，暴露了 npm 生态中持续的供应链风险。该事件强调对依赖项的严格管控、可重复构建和来源可信性的重要性，尤其在云环境中。

items.title_en: Meta workers can opt out of being tracked at work up to 30 min
items.title_zh: Meta 员工可在工作时最多不被追踪30分钟
items.summary_en: Meta has updated its employee monitoring policy to allow workers to opt out of being tracked for up to 30 minutes at a time. The change underscores the tension between productivity analytics and employee privacy in big tech.
items.summary_zh: Meta 更新员工监控政策，允许员工单次最多有30分钟不被追踪。此举凸显了大科技公司在生产力分析与员工隐私之间的权衡。

items.title_en: I was recently diagnosed with anti-NMDA receptor encephalitis
items.title_zh: 我最近被诊断患上抗 NMDA 受体脑炎
items.summary_en: A personal account of being diagnosed with anti-NMDA receptor encephalitis, a rare autoimmune condition that can mimic psychiatric illness. The post emphasizes the difficulty of correct diagnosis and the importance of awareness among clinicians and patients. It sheds light on the intersection of neurology and mental health.
items.summary_zh: 作者分享罕见的抗 NMDA 受体脑炎诊断经历，这种疾病常因症状类似精神疾病而误诊。文章强调正确诊断的难度，以及提高临床与患者对该病的认知重要性，彰显神经科与精神健康的交叉议题。

items.title_en: A 10 year old Xeon is all you need
items.title_zh: 一颗十年前的 Xeon 就足够用
items.summary_en: A decade-old Xeon can still power modern workloads if software is tuned for efficiency. The post demonstrates competitive results on a 2016-era server CPU, encouraging a rethink of hardware budgets for modest-scale deployments.
items.summary_zh: 经过优化的软件仍能让十年前的 Xeon 功能不错地应对现代工作负载。该案例在 2016 年代的服务器 CPU 上展现出具有竞争力的性能，促使小型部署重新考量硬件预算。

items.title_en: Can the stockmarket swallow Anthropic, SpaceX and OpenAI?
items.title_zh: 股市能否容纳Anthropic、SpaceX与OpenAI？
items.summary_en: The Economist asks whether public markets have the capacity to absorb the outsized valuations and funding needs of Anthropic, SpaceX, and OpenAI. It highlights structural constraints like liquidity, dilution, and investor risk appetite that could slow up-rounds for highly valued private firms. The takeaway is that public markets may cap how quickly such companies can scale via public offerings, shaping their financing strategies.
items.summary_zh: 该文章质疑公开市场是否具备吸收Anthropic、SpaceX与OpenAI等估值膨胀企业及其融资需求的能力。它强调流动性、股本稀释和投资者风险偏好等结构性约束，可能放缓高估值私有公司的轮融资。核心观点是公开市场可能限制这些公司通过上市快速扩张的能力，从而影响它们的融资策略。

items.title_en: Cloudflare Turnstile requiring fingerprintable WebGL
items.title_zh: Cloudflare Turnstile 要求可指纹化的 WebGL
items.summary_en: Cloudflare Turnstile now reportedly relies on fingerprintable WebGL, enabling GPU-based device fingerprinting. That blurs the line between anti-bot verification and user surveillance, raising privacy concerns for developers and users who expected a privacy-friendly CAPTCHA alternative. Expect calls for opt-outs or mitigations in browsers and privacy tooling.
items.summary_zh: 据称 Cloudflare Turnstile 现正使用可指纹化的 WebGL，借助 GPU 渲染实施设备指纹。这模糊了反机器人验证与用户监控之间的界线，引发对隐私的担忧，尤其是对期待更隐私友好验证码的用户与开发者。浏览器和隐私工具可能会提出规避或缓解措施的呼声。

items.title_en: Ask HN: What was your "oh shit" moment with GenAI?
items.title_zh: Ask HN：你在 GenAI 使用中的‘哦糟了’时刻是什么？
items.summary_en: A community prompt asking for the worst or funniest 'oh shit' moments with GenAI, highlighting surprising failures, hallucinations, and ethical concerns. It gathers practical anecdotes for risk awareness.
items.summary_zh: 社区发起 Ask HN，征集关于在生成式 AI 使用过程中的“哦糟了”时刻，揭示模型幻觉、局限及伦理风险等真实案例。

items.title_en: VoidZero Is Joining Cloudflare
items.title_zh: VoidZero 加入 Cloudflare
items.summary_en: Cloudflare welcomes VoidZero to its ecosystem, expanding its network of partners and collaborators. The arrangement is expected to bring VoidZero's capabilities into Cloudflare's edge and security stack, enabling joint tooling for developers building on Cloudflare's platform. This underscores Cloudflare's strategy of growing a robust, partner-driven developer ecosystem.
items.summary_zh: Cloudflare 宣布 VoidZero 加入其生态系统，作为扩展开发者生态和安全协作的一部分。双方的整合将把 VoidZero 的技术引入 Cloudflare 的边缘与安全栈，帮助开发者在 Cloudflare 平台上构建与保护应用。此举体现 Cloudflare 持续打造以伙伴为驱动的生态策略。

items.title_en: Pwnd Blaster: Hacking your PC using your speaker without ever touching it
items.title_zh: Hacking your PC using your speaker without ever touching it
items.summary_en: Researchers demonstrate a BadUSB-style attack that uses a speaker to compromise a PC without any direct user interaction. The technique underlines how trusted hardware can be weaponized through subtle channels, raising concerns about supply chain, peripherals, and device authentication. It highlights the risk of peripheral-based exploits and the need for hardware-level defenses.
items.summary_zh: 研究人员展示了利用扬声器进行 BadUSB 式攻击、在无需任何直接交互的情况下入侵电脑的可能性。这一技巧暴露了受信任硬件可被通过微妙通道 weaponize 的风险，凸显了外设信任、供应链与硬件认证方面的挑战。

items.title_en: Meta confirms 1000s of Instagram accounts were hacked by abusing its AI chatbot
items.title_zh: Meta 确认数千 Instagram 账号因滥用其 AI 聊天机器人而被入侵
items.summary_en: Thousands of Instagram accounts were compromised as attackers abused an AI chatbot feature, exposing new attack vectors for prompt injection and social engineering. The incident underscores security risks in consumer AI assistants and the need for safer safeguards and monitoring.
items.summary_zh: Meta 确认数千个 Instagram 账号因滥用其 AI 聊天机器人而被入侵，暴露出通过提示注入与社交工程的攻击向量。事件凸显消费级 AI 助手在安全性方面的风险，以及对更安全防护与监控的需求。

items.title_en: Adafruit receives demand letter from Fenwick legal counsel on behalf of Flux.ai
items.title_zh: Adafruit 收到 Flux.ai 代表的 Fenwick 律师事务所律师函
items.summary_en: Adafruit reports receiving a formal demand letter from Fenwick & West on behalf of Flux.ai, signaling a potential IP or licensing dispute. The letter underscores how IP questions can affect hobbyist hardware vendors and the broader open-source hardware ecosystem. Readers should watch for updates on how Adafruit responds and what this means for developers and retailers shipping AI-enabled hardware.
items.summary_zh: Adafruit 表示收到了 Flux.ai 代表的 Fenwick 律师事务所发出的正式函件，暗示可能存在知识产权或许可方面的争议。此类函件凸显了知识产权问题对爱好者硬件厂商及开源硬件生态的潜在影响。请关注 Adafruit 的回应及此事对开发者和销售 AI 硬件的影响。

items.title_en: 1-Click GitHub Token Stealing via a VSCode Bug
items.title_zh: 通过 VSCode 漏洞的一键式 GitHub 令牌窃取
items.summary_en: A VSCode bug exposes GitHub tokens with a single click, enabling token theft via the IDE’s authentication flow. The incident underscores the risk of embedded auth in development tools and token-scoping hygiene; users should rotate tokens, enable 2FA, and update to patched versions.
items.summary_zh: VSCode 中的一个漏洞使攻击者能够在一次点击中窃取 GitHub 访问令牌，利用集成的认证流程进行攻击。这一事件暴露了开发工具中嵌入式认证的风险以及令牌作用域带来的安全隐患。用户应轮换令牌、启用两步验证并更新到修补版本，同时谨慎管理令牌权限。

items.title_en: Codex just found a "workaround" of not having sudo on my PC
items.title_zh: Codex 找到一个无需 sudo 就能在我的电脑工作的方法
items.summary_en: A reveal shows Codex-powered coding workflows finding ways to perform privileged tasks without sudo, hinting at potential privilege-escalation risks. It highlights why secure defaults and careful permission handling matter when AI-generated code is used.
items.summary_zh: 透露显示通过 Codex 的工作流，可在不使用 sudo 的情况下完成特权任务，提示潜在的特权提升风险。强调在使用 AI 代码时，需依赖安全默认设置和严格权限控制。

items.title_en: U.S. to dismantle system tracking Atlantic currents that are at risk of collapse
items.title_zh: 美国将拆除对濒临崩溃风险的大西洋环流监测系统
items.summary_en: Policy moves to retire the monitoring system tracking Atlantic currents amid concerns about AMOC stability, raising questions about data availability for climate forecasting and research.
items.summary_zh: 关于美国计划拆除对大西洋环流监测的系统，担忧 AMOC 可能崩溃，数据缺失将影响气候预测与研究。

items.title_en: The Pirate Bay Remains Resilient, 20 Years After the Raid
items.title_zh: 海盗湾在遭突袭二十年后仍然顽强
items.summary_en: The Pirate Bay remains active two decades after a major raid, evolving with mirrors and resilient access methods. The story highlights ongoing demand for piracy and the challenges of shutting down persistent platforms.
items.summary_zh: 海盗湾在被突袭二十年后依然活跃，通过镜像站和多样化的访问方式继续运作。这反映出对盗版的持续需求以及关闭持续存在的平台的难度。

items.title_en: Uber's $1,500/month AI limit is a useful signal for AI tool pricing
items.title_zh: Uber 将 AI 工具使用额度设定为每月 1500 美元，为定价提供信号
items.summary_en: Uber caps AI tool usage at $1,500 per month, a concrete pricing signal for enterprise AI tooling. The cap affects individual power users and teams alike, influencing how startups and enterprises budget for copilots, assistants, and automation. It underscores the market’s sensitivity to costs and value at scale.
items.summary_zh: Uber 将 AI 工具使用额度设定为每月 1500 美元，为企业级 AI 工具定价提供了明确信号。该上限影响个人与团队的使用成本，促使初创公司与企业在成本与价值之间权衡。

items.title_en: Gov.uk has replaced Stripe with Dutch provider Adyen
items.title_zh: GOV.UK 已用 Adyen 取代 Stripe 的支付服务
items.summary_en: GOV.UK replaced Stripe with Adyen for payments, indicating a public-sector shift to different payment providers. The change may affect developers integrating with government payments and reflects considerations like cost, reliability, and multi-region coverage.
items.summary_zh: GOV.UK 将支付服务从 Stripe 切换至 Adyen，显示公共部门在支付供应商选择上的调整。对开发者集成政府支付的方式可能有影响，并反映成本、可靠性和区域覆盖等因素的考量。

items.title_en: Mouseless – keyboard-driven control of macOS/Linux/Windows
items.title_zh: Mouseless—通过键盘控制 macOS/Linux/Windows
items.summary_en: Mouseless offers keyboard-driven control across macOS, Linux, and Windows, letting users navigate and operate the OS without a mouse. It targets power users and accessibility advocates seeking faster, distraction-free interactions.
items.summary_zh: Mouseless 提供跨 macOS/Linux/Windows 的全键盘控制，使用户在无需鼠标的情况下进行系统导航与操作，面向追求高效和无干扰体验的用户与无障碍场景。

items.title_en: Ian's Secure Shoelace Knot
items.title_zh: 伊恩的安全鞋带打结方法
items.summary_en: Describes a simple knot designed for security to prevent laces from loosening during activity. The page lays out steps and tips to achieve a tight, reliable knot, backed by practical demonstrations.
items.summary_zh: 介绍了一种简单但稳固的鞋带打结法，能够在活动中防止鞋带松散。文章给出具体步骤与要点，并辅以实用演示，适合日常使用。

items.title_en: Building from zero after addiction, prison, and a felony
items.title_zh: 从零开始：戒瘾、监狱与重罪后的重建
items.summary_en: From addiction, prison, and a felony, the author documents rebuilding life and career from scratch. Through skill-building, persistence, and supportive networks, the story offers practical insights for reintegration and second chances in tech.
items.summary_zh: 这篇自传式博文讲述在克服成瘾、服刑与刑事定罪后，作者如何从零开始重建生活与职业。通过建立技能、坚持不懈和依靠网络的支持，探讨在科技领域重新融入和把握第二次机会的可行路径。

items.title_en: Age verification for social media, the beginning of the end for a free internet?
items.title_zh: 社交媒体年龄验证：自由互联网的终结之始？
items.summary_en: The post discusses age verification proposals for social media and argues they could erode privacy, anonymity, and free internet principles, with practical implications for UX, accessibility, and safety.
items.summary_zh: 文章分析社交媒体的年龄验证方案，认为在提升安全性的同时可能侵蚀隐私与互联网的开放性，需要在安全与自由之间取得权衡。

items.title_en: Pentagon raised threat of Israeli spying on U.S. to highest level, sources say
items.title_zh: 五角大楼将以色列对美情报活动的威胁提升至最高级别
items.summary_en: The Pentagon reportedly elevated the risk level of Israeli spying on the U.S. to the highest tier, signaling heightened concern within defense and intelligence communities. The move could affect security cooperation and influence internal policies on intelligence-sharing and counter-espionage. It underscores how geopolitical tensions ripple into tech and data security considerations.
items.summary_zh: 据称，五角大楼将以色列对美情报活动的威胁等级提高到最高级别，反映出防务与情报机构的担忧升级。此举可能影响两国在情报共享与安全合作方面的政策走向，并推动相关防范与反情报措施的调整。

items.title_en: DaVinci Resolve 21
items.title_zh: 达芬奇 Resolve 21
items.summary_en: DaVinci Resolve 21 bundles improved color tools, performance, and cloud-friendly collaboration, with AI-assisted features that appeal to prosumers and studios alike.
items.summary_zh: DaVinci Resolve 21 包含更强的色彩工具、性能提升及云端协作功能，并新增 AI 支持特性，适合专业与准专业工作流。

items.title_en: MAI-Code-1-Flash
items.title_zh: MAI Code-1 快闪
items.summary_en: Microsoft unveils MAI Code-1-Flash, a compact addition to the MAI code-generation lineup. The release emphasizes fast, integrated coding assistance designed to fit into developer workflows without overwhelming users. It signals Microsoft’s push toward lightweight, in-editor AI tools for everyday programming.
items.summary_zh: 微软发布 MAI Code-1-Flash，作为 MAI 代码生成家族的一员，强调在开发者工作流中快速、无缝的编码协助。此举显示微软在将 AI 工具嵌入到日常编码任务中的持续投入，关注轻量化与易用性。

items.title_en: CS336: Language Modeling from Scratch
items.title_zh: CS336：从零开始的语言建模
items.summary_en: Stanford's CS336 course teaches language modeling from scratch, focusing on core ideas and practical intuition without heavy dependencies. It's useful for researchers and engineers who want to understand model architecture and training dynamics.
items.summary_zh: 斯坦福 CS336 课程教学生从零开始构建语言模型，强调核心概念与直觉，尽量减少对依赖的要求。对想要理解模型结构与训练动态的研究者和工程师很有价值。

items.title_en: Anthropic confidentially submits draft S-1 to the SEC
items.title_zh: Anthropic 向 SEC confidentially 提交 S-1 初稿
items.summary_en: Anthropic filed a confidential draft S-1 with the SEC, signaling intent to pursue an IPO. The move comes as AI safety-focused startups navigate a crowded funding environment and evolving regulatory expectations.
items.summary_zh: Anthropic 已向美国证券交易委员会提交保密的 S-1 初稿，表明其上市意图。此举发生在AI 安全型初创公司竞争激烈、监管预期改变的市场环境中。

items.title_en: Creatine raises brain energy levels and slows cognitive decline: study
items.title_zh: 肌酸提升大脑能量并减缓认知衰退的研究
items.summary_en: A study finds creatine supplementation boosts brain energy and slows cognitive decline, potentially by up to 30% in early Alzheimer's progression. If confirmed, this could influence dietary guidelines and therapeutic strategies for neurodegenerative diseases.
items.summary_zh: 研究显示补充肌酸可以提升大脑能量并减缓认知衰退，早期阿尔茨海默病可能下降速度最高可达约30%。若再证实，这将影响膳食建议和神经退行性疾病的治疗策略。

items.title_en: Anthropic's open-source framework for AI-powered vulnerability discovery
items.title_zh: Anthropic 开源框架用于 AI 驱动的漏洞发现
items.summary_en: Anthropic released an open-source framework to aid AI-assisted vulnerability discovery in software. The toolkit aims to standardize how researchers build, run, and compare AI-driven security analyses, promoting reproducible, faster security research.
items.summary_zh: Anthropic 发布了一个开源框架，用以辅助 AI 驱动的软件漏洞发现。该工具集旨在标准化研究者如何构建、运行并比较 AI 相关的安全分析，推动可重复的漏洞研究并可能加快修复进程。

items.title_en: When AI Builds Itself: Our progress toward recursive self-improvement
items.title_zh: AI 自我构建：向递归自我提升推进的进展
items.summary_en: Anthropic outlines progress in recursive self-improvement, a scenario where AI systems iteratively enhance themselves with reduced human input. The discussion touches on safety, alignment, and governance challenges as capabilities scale.
items.summary_zh: Anthropic 概述递归自我提升的进展，即 AI 系统在尽量减少人类介入的情况下迭代自我改进。讨论涉及能力提升带来的安全、对齐与治理挑战。

items.title_en: The Website Specification
items.title_zh: 网站规范
items.summary_en: A proposal outlining a formal specification for websites to standardize structure, semantics, and tooling.
items.summary_zh: 提出对网站进行正式规范的提案，旨在统一网页结构、语义和相关工具链。

items.title_en: New method turns ocean water into drinking water, without waste
items.title_zh: 新方法将海水转化为饮用水且实现零废水排放
items.summary_en: A new desalination method converts ocean water into drinking water with no waste. If scalable, it could dramatically reduce the environmental footprint of desalination and broaden access to freshwater.
items.summary_zh: 一种新型海水淡化方法能够直接生产饮用水且零废水排放。若实现商业化，可能大幅降低淡化过程的环境影响并提升淡水供应。

items.title_en: Dav2d
items.title_zh: Dav2d
items.summary_en: Dav2d is a fast, open-source video decoder project.
items.summary_zh: Dav2d 是一个开源的视频解码库，旨在提供高效解码性能。

items.title_en: AI Agent Guidelines for CS336 at Stanford
items.title_zh: 斯坦福 CS336 的 AI 代理指南
items.summary_en: The CS336 assignment package outlines guidelines for building and evaluating AI agents in a coursework setting, covering prompts, tool use, and safety considerations. It helps students avoid common pitfalls while promoting practical patterns for agent design.
items.summary_zh: CS336 作业包列出构建与评估 AI 代理的指南，涵盖提示、工具使用和安全要点。帮助学生避免常见误区，同时推广实际的代理设计模式。

items.title_en: Why Janet? (2023)
items.title_zh: 为何选择 Janet？（2023）
items.summary_en: A concise look at why Janet matters in 2023 and what makes it appealing in modern programming.
items.summary_zh: 简要探讨在2023年为何 Janet 语言值得关注及其在现代编程中的魅力。

items.title_en: Anthropic, please ship an official Claude Desktop for Linux
items.title_zh: Anthropic，请为 Linux 发布官方 Claude 桌面客户端
items.summary_en: There is a call for an official Linux desktop app for Claude; currently users rely on web or unofficial options, creating cross-platform friction. A native client would improve performance, privacy, and workflow integration for developers and researchers.
items.summary_zh: 呼吁为 Claude 发布官方 Linux 桌面应用；目前多数用户依赖网页或非官方方案，跨平台工作流受阻。原生客户端将提升性能、隐私和开发者工作流整合。

items.title_en: CT scans of BYD car parts
items.title_zh: 比亚迪汽车部件的 CT 扫描
items.summary_en: High-resolution CT scans reveal internal features and potential manufacturing artifacts in BYD car parts, showcasing the power of non-destructive imaging for QA and design. Such scans help engineers verify tolerances and spot hidden defects without disassembly, enabling faster QA and reverse engineering.
items.summary_zh: 高分辨率的 CT 扫描揭示了比亚迪汽车部件的内部结构与潜在制造缺陷，展现出无损成像在 QA 与设计优化中的作用。此类扫描帮助工程师核验公差、发现隐藏的制造痕迹，并在不拆解部件的情况下推进逆向工程。

items.title_en: Did Claude increase bugs in rsync?
items.title_zh: Claude 是否在 rsync 中引入更多漏洞？
items.summary_en: An analysis questions whether using Claude correlates with more bugs in rsync, raising questions about AI-assisted tooling reliability in critical utilities. It underscores the need for rigorous testing when integrating AI copilots.
items.summary_zh: 分析指出在 rsync 中使用 Claude 可能带来更多漏洞，这凸显了在关键工具中使用 AI 助手时对可靠性和充分测试的关注。

items.title_en: pg_durable: Microsoft open sources in-database durable execution
items.title_zh: pg_durable：微软开源在数据库内的持久执行
items.summary_en: Microsoft open-sourced pg_durable, a project aiming to provide durable, in-database execution for PostgreSQL. It tackles fault tolerance for long-running analytics and complex workflows by keeping computation results persistent within the database layer.
items.summary_zh: 微软开源 pg_durable，目标是在 PostgreSQL 中实现持久化的数据库内执行。该项目通过在数据库层持久化计算结果，提升长时间分析与复杂工作流的容错性。

items.title_en: Use your Nvidia GPU's VRAM as swap space on Linux
items.title_zh: 在 Linux 上将 Nvidia GPU 的 VRAM 用作交换空间
items.summary_en: A Linux tool exposes Nvidia GPU VRAM as a swap device via NBD, letting systems swap to GPU memory under memory pressure. It's a niche hack that can extend usable RAM on GPUs with large VRAM but performance depends on workload and memory bandwidth. Not a replacement for main RAM, but a clever hack for specific workloads.
items.summary_zh: 一款 Linux 工具通过 NBD 将 Nvidia GPU 的 VRAM 暂时作为交换空间使用。对于显存较大的显卡来说，在内存压力时可以延迟将数据写入磁盘，但它并非主 RAM 的替代品，性能取决于 workload 与带宽。

items.title_en: GrapheneOS user reported to authorities for using GrapheneOS
items.title_zh: 因使用 GrapheneOS 而被举报给当局的用户
items.summary_en: Privacy-focused mobile OS choices remain sensitive in some jurisdictions, as this case shows a GrapheneOS user being reported to authorities simply for using it. The incident illustrates how tool choices for privacy can attract scrutiny, raising concerns about chilling effects and regulatory overreach. It underscores the ongoing tension between privacy, security tools, and law enforcement practices.
items.summary_zh: 在部分地区，隐私友好型手机系统的使用仍然敏感。仅因使用 GrapheneOS 就被举报，显示出对隐私工具的监管压力和潜在的压制性后果。此事凸显了隐私保护与执法之间的紧张关系，以及对开源安全工具的合规边界需要清晰界定。

items.title_en: French-Iranian author Marjane Satrapi, author of 'Persepolis', dies at 56
items.title_zh: 法国-伊朗作家玛尔詹娜·萨特拉皮去世，享年56岁
items.summary_en: Marjane Satrapi, the acclaimed author of Persepolis, dies at 56. Her graphic memoir bridged personal history and political upheaval, influencing generations of readers and artists worldwide. Her death marks a significant loss for comics, literature, and diasporic voices.
items.summary_zh: 著名图像小说《 Persepolis 》作者玛尔詹娜·萨特拉皮去世，享年56岁。她以图像化的自传叙述将个人经历与政治动荡相连，影响了全球无数读者与艺术家。她的离世对漫画、文学和侨民声音而言都是重大损失。

items.title_en: Ask HN: Why is the HN crowd so anti-AI?
items.title_zh: Ask HN：为什么 HN 的人群对 AI 那么反对？
items.summary_en: The discussion surfaces why hackers on HN push back on AI hype—safety concerns, data usage, and misinformation—reflecting a culture wary of unverified breakthroughs.
items.summary_zh: 讨论揭示了 Hacker News 社区对 AI 热潮的抵触原因：安全性、数据使用以及错误信息等担忧，折射出对未经证实突破的谨慎态度。

items.title_en: MacBook Neo is so popular that Apple doubled production
items.title_zh: MacBook Neo 火爆，苹果将产量翻倍
items.summary_en: The MacBook Neo has proven popular enough for Apple to double production, signaling strong demand for Apple Silicon laptops in 2026. It hints at supply chain resilience and the ongoing push to higher-performance, battery-friendly devices in premium markets.
items.summary_zh: MacBook Neo 需求强劲，苹果已将产量翻倍，反映出 2026 年对 Apple Silicon 笔记本的强劲需求。此举也揭示了供应链的韧性和高性能、长电池续航的高端笔记本市场热度。

items.title_en: Astronauts told to return to ISS after sheltering over air leak repairs
items.title_zh: 宇航员在修复空气泄漏后被指示返回国际空间站
items.summary_en: Astronauts were told to return to the ISS after sheltering during air leak repairs. The move underscores ongoing maintenance risks in space habitats and how teams manage crew safety during contingencies.
items.summary_zh: 宇航员在对空气泄漏进行修复并避难后，被指示返回国际空间站。这一安排凸显太空栖息地的持续维护风险，以及地面团队在应对突发情况时对乘员安全的管理。

items.title_en: 32GB of DDR5 now costs $375 – AI shortage continues to squeeze PC building
items.title_zh: 32GB DDR5现价375美元—AI短缺持续挤压PC组装成本
items.summary_en: DDR5 memory for 32GB modules has risen to around $375, reflecting AI-driven demand pressures. The price squeeze affects DIY PC builders and smaller workloads, nudging buyers toward different configurations.
items.summary_zh: 32GB DDR5 内存现价约375美元，反映 AI 相关需求的上行压力。价格紧缩影响 DIY PC 构建者与小型工作负载，推动用户调整为其他配置。

items.title_en: Google will pay SpaceX $920M per month for compute
items.title_zh: 谷歌将每月向 SpaceX 支付 9.2 亿美元用于计算资源
items.summary_en: Google is striking a blockbuster deal, paying SpaceX about $920 million per month for compute capacity. The arrangement signals that AI workloads are increasingly sourced from a mix of traditional and non-traditional infrastructure providers, expanding the market for space- and edge-enabled resources. It highlights how hyperscalers are diversifying capacity to secure AI throughput at scale.
items.summary_zh: 谷歌与 SpaceX 签下了一笔每月约9.2亿美元的计算资源采购协议，显示 AI 计算正从传统基础设施扩展到更广泛的提供者。此举凸显云巨头在扩大容量来源上的多元化，甚至包括空间/边缘资源，以应对大规模 AI 工作负载的需求。

items.title_en: Nvidia RTX Spark
items.title_zh: NVIDIA RTX Spark
items.summary_en: NVIDIA unveils RTX Spark, a platform aimed at accelerating AI workloads with specialized hardware and software integration. The release could influence developer tools, deployment pipelines, and edge AI workflows.
items.summary_zh: NVIDIA 发布 RTX Spark 平台，面向加速 AI 工作负载，整合硬件与软件生态。可能影响开发工具、部署流水线和边缘 AI 的应用场景。

items.title_en: 1-Bit Bonsai Image 4B Image Generation for Local Devices
items.title_zh: 1-Bit Bonsai：在本地设备上的 4B 图像生成
items.summary_en: A 4B-parameter image generation model dubbed 1-Bit Bonsai runs on consumer hardware, enabling on-device, offline image synthesis. This kind of lightweight model lowers hardware and privacy barriers for on-device AI workflows.
items.summary_zh: 一个名为 1-Bit Bonsai 的 4B 参数图像生成模型能够在普通设备上离线运行，实现在本地完成图片合成。此类轻量化模型降低了对高性能显卡的依赖，提升了隐私和离线工作流的可用性。

items.title_en: AI outperforms law professors in Stanford Law study
items.title_zh: AI 在斯坦福法学院研究中超越法学教授
items.summary_en: A Stanford study finds AI models outperform law professors on certain tasks, highlighting AI’s growing capabilities in legal reasoning and research. The result raises questions about law-school pedagogy and underscores the need for guardrails and human judgment.
items.summary_zh: 斯坦福法学院的一项研究显示，在某些法律任务中，AI 的表现可与甚至超过法学教授，凸显了法律推理与检索能力的快速提升，同时也强调治理与人类监督的重要性。

items.title_en: Tracing a powerful GNSS interference source over Europe
items.title_zh: 追踪欧洲的强力 GNSS 干扰源
items.summary_en: Researchers trace a powerful GNSS interference source over Europe, characterizing the signal and narrowing down its likely origins. The work has implications for aviation, autonomous navigation, and security, illustrating how signal analysis can localize and mitigate outages.
items.summary_zh: 研究人员在欧洲追踪一处强烈的 GNSS 干扰源，对信号特征进行建模并初步定位来源。这项工作对航空、自动导航与安全领域影响深远，展示了通过信号分析定位和缓解中断的可能性。

items.title_en: C++: The Documentary
items.title_zh: C++：纪录片
items.summary_en: The documentary traces the evolution of C++, from its early design goals to modern standards, featuring insights from key figures and code milestones. It situates the language's lasting appeal in its blend of performance, control, and ongoing standards work, explaining why it remains essential for systems programming. The piece also touches on debates about complexity and ecosystem maturity.
items.summary_zh: 这部纪录片追溯 C++ 的演变，从早期设计目标到现代标准，采访了关键人物并回顾了重要代码里程碑。它将语言的持久魅力归因于性能、控制力与持续的标准化工作，以及为何在系统编程领域仍然不可或缺。文中也触及关于复杂性与生态系统成熟度的讨论。

items.title_en: A walking tour of surveillance infrastructure in Seattle (2020)
items.title_zh: 西雅图监控基础设施的步行导览（2020）
items.summary_en: A walk-through of Seattle’s surveillance landscape reveals cameras, sensors, and data flows woven into city life. It highlights how pervasive infrastructure shapes behavior and raises questions about accountability in urban monitoring.
items.summary_zh: 这篇对西雅图监控基础设施的步行导览展示了城市中遍布的摄像头、传感器与数据流。该景观凸显监控基础设施如何影响人们的行为，并引发对城市治理与问责的思考。

items.title_en: Wind and solar generated more power than gas globally in April 2026
items.title_zh: 全球2026年4月风能和太阳能发电量首次超过天然气
items.summary_en: Wind and solar surpassed natural gas as the largest source of global power generation in April 2026, marking a milestone for the energy transition. The surge reflects ongoing growth and affordability of renewables, but gas remains a backstop for reliability and volatility in the grid.
items.summary_zh: 在2026年4月，风能与太阳能合计成为全球最大的发电来源，标志着能源转型的重要里程碑。此增长反映了可再生能源的持续扩张和成本下降，但在不稳定时段，天然气仍是电网的回补能源。

items.title_en: Gemma 4 QAT models: Optimizing compression for mobile and laptop efficiency
items.title_zh: Gemma 4 QAT 模型：为移动端与笔记本优化压缩
items.summary_en: Gemma 4 introduces quantization-aware training (QAT) models that optimize compression for lighter inference on mobile and laptop devices. The approach aims to shrink model size and energy use while preserving accuracy, enabling better on-device AI performance.
items.summary_zh: Gemma 4 引入量化感知训练（QAT）模型，针对移动端和笔记本实现更高效的压缩，缩减模型体积与能耗，同时尽量保持精度。这将推动在边缘设备上更实用的本地 AI 推理。

items.title_en: macOS needs its grid back
items.title_zh: macOS 需要回归网格布局
items.summary_en: macOS has drifted away from grid-based window management, making layouts feel unpredictable for power users. A consistent grid or snap-to-grid approach could restore predictable workflows and improve multitasking on the desktop. Without a stable grid, layouts suffer as apps proliferate and screen sizes vary.
items.summary_zh: macOS 的窗口布局系统已经失去原有的网格化管理，导致高效工作流变得不稳定。文章主张回归网格对齐或引入更灵活的平铺布局，以提升多任务处理的效率。随着屏幕尺寸和应用数量的增加，缺乏稳定网格的工作流将更加低效。

items.title_en: Chuwi Minibook X
items.title_zh: Chuwi Minibook X
items.summary_en: Chuwi's Minibook X continues the brand's budget-friendly ultrabook line with a compact footprint and entry-level specs. It highlights ongoing demand for portable, affordable laptops in budget-conscious markets and the trade-offs between price, battery life, and performance.
items.summary_zh: Chuwi Minibook X 延续了品牌的经济型超极本路线，体积紧凑、配置入门。它体现了在预算友好市场对便携笔记本的持续需求，以及价格、续航和性能之间的权衡。

items.title_en: I built a vulnerable app and spent $1,500 seeing if LLMs could hack it
items.title_zh: 我构建了一个易被利用的应用，花了1500美元测试大型语言模型是否能入侵
items.summary_en: I built a vulnerable app and spent $1,500 seeing if LLMs could hack it. The experiment demonstrates the real security risks of AI-assisted tooling and how quickly attackers might automate vulnerability discovery.
items.summary_zh: 我构建了一个易被利用的应用，花了1500美元测试大型语言模型是否能入侵。实验揭示了利用 AI 辅助工具进行安全攻击的现实风险，以及攻击者自动化漏洞利用的潜在速度。

items.title_en: Ntsc-rs – open-source video emulation of analog TV and VHS artifacts
items.title_zh: NTSC-rs：开源的模拟电视与VHS伪影视频仿真
items.summary_en: NTSC-rs is an open-source Rust library that emulates the visual quirks of analog NTSC and VHS signals, including color bleed, dot crawl, and tracking jitter. It provides a toolset for researchers, retro-game developers, and artists to recreate authentic vintage video aesthetics or build preservation/test pipelines.
items.summary_zh: NTSC-rs 是一个用 Rust 编写的开源库，用于仿真 NTSC 与 VHS 信号的视觉伪影，如颜色渗色、点状爬行和追踪抖动。它为研究者、复古游戏开发者和艺术家提供重现真实老式视频风格的工具链，并有助于数字化保存与测试流程。

items.title_en: Chipotlai Max
items.title_zh: Chipotlai Max
items.summary_en: Chipotlai Max is a GitHub project.
items.summary_zh: Chipotlai Max 是一个 GitHub 项目。

items.title_en: The desperation of NYTimes
items.title_zh: 纽约时报的绝望
items.summary_en: The piece argues that the New York Times shows signs of desperation as it navigates the digital media era. It points to aggressive monetization, sensational framing, and strategic missteps as indicators of an older newsroom scrambling to stay dominant.
items.summary_zh: 文章认为《纽约时报》在数字时代显露出越来越多的绝望迹象。文中指向商业化营收、耸人听闻的报道与错位的战略，反映出老牌新闻机构在努力维持主导地位时的困境。

items.title_en: Love systemd timers
items.title_zh: 你还没足够爱上 Systemd 定时器
items.summary_en: The post argues that systemd timers are underappreciated compared to traditional cron or other schedulers. It outlines advantages like finer-grained control, dependency management, and easy logging, with practical examples for daily admin use.
items.summary_zh: 这篇博文认为对 systemd 定时器的认可还不够高，甚至慢于人们对 cron 的使用热情。它总结了 systemd 定时器的优点，如更细粒度的控制、依赖管理和简化日志记录，并给出工作中的实际用例。

items.title_en: The 29th International Obfuscated C Code Contest (IOCCC) 2025 Winners
items.title_zh: 第29届国际混淆C代码竞赛（IOCCC）2025 获奖作品
items.summary_en: IOCCC 2025 winners showcase the year's boldest obfuscated C programs, pushing compilers and tricks to the extreme. Entries rely on preprocessor gymnastics, clever data encodings, and unusual memory tricks to fit a program into tiny form factors. They illustrate C's expressive boundaries while underscoring the importance of readability in real-world code.
items.summary_zh: 2025 年 IOCCC 获奖作品展现了年度最具创造性的混淆 C 代码，常用预处理器花招、另类数据表示和内存布局技巧。此类作品凸显 C 的灵活性，同时也提醒在实际软件开发中注重可读性与可维护性的重要性，并展示数十年演进后的仍具实现空间的编程模式。

items.title_en: How's Linear so fast? A technical breakdown
items.title_zh: Linear 为何如此快？一份技术拆解
items.summary_en: A deep dive into Linear's performance, explaining how the product achieves snappy UX from API design to frontend optimizations. The breakdown covers efficient data fetching, caching, optimistic UI, and deployment choices, with takeaways for building fast SaaS apps.
items.summary_zh: 本文从 API 设计到前端优化，解析 Linear 如何实现流畅的用户体验。重点包括高效数据获取、缓存、乐观 UI 和基础设施部署等要点，以及对构建快速 SaaS 应用的可借鉴之处。

items.title_en: UK media fails to disclose defence sector links in nearly 60% of cases
items.title_zh: 英国媒体在近60%的报道中未披露防务领域关联
items.summary_en: An analysis finds UK media frequently omits defence-sector links among the sources they cite, with disclosure missing in almost 60% of cases. The lack of transparency raises questions about conflicts of interest shaping coverage on arms, policy debates, and public trust in journalism. Strengthening disclosure norms could help readers better assess credibility.
items.summary_zh: 一项分析显示，英国媒体在报道中经常未披露与防务行业相关的利益关系，近60%的案例缺乏披露。这种透明度不足可能影响军备议题报道的客观性并削弱公众对新闻的信任。完善披露标准有助于读者更准确评估报道可信度。

items.title_en: United Airlines 767 returns to Newark after Bluetooth name sparks alert
items.title_zh: 联合航空 767 因蓝牙名称触发警报返航纽瓦克
items.summary_en: A United Airlines 767 diverted to Newark after a Bluetooth name triggered an alert, prompting security protocols to kick in. The incident underscores how small device-level identifiers can influence aviation safety and the challenges of pervasive Bluetooth in cabins.
items.summary_zh: 一架联合航空 767 因蓝牙名称触发警报而返航纽瓦克，启动安保程序。事件凸显机舱内的蓝牙设备标识可能对航空安全产生影响，以及在舱内广泛使用蓝牙所带来的挑战。

items.title_en: OpenAI frontier models and Codex are now available on AWS
items.title_zh: OpenAI Frontier 模型与 Codex 现已在 AWS 上线
items.summary_en: OpenAI frontier models and Codex are now available on AWS, enabling developers to deploy large-scale AI capabilities within their existing AWS workflows. The integration supports governance, data locality, and scalable deployment, catalyzing AI adoption for enterprises already in the AWS ecosystem. It signals a cloud-first distribution pattern for OpenAI's evolving offerings.
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 的 Frontier 模型与 Codex 现已在 AWS 可用，使开发者能够在现有的 AWS 工作流中部署大规模 AI 能力。该整合支持企业级治理、数据本地化与可扩展部署，可能加速已在 AWS 生态中的企业采用 AI。此举也体现 OpenAI 持续以云端分发新产品的策略。

items.title_en: Conventional Commits encourages focus on the wrong things
items.title_zh: Conventional Commits 将关注点放在错误的地方
items.summary_en: A critique argues Conventional Commits focuses on commit message formatting rather than meaningful changes, potentially harming review quality and tooling. It suggests rebalancing emphasis toward semantic commits and broader health signals.
items.summary_zh: 对 Conventional Commits 的批评认为它把注意力放在提交信息格式上，而忽略了变更的语义与代码质量，可能削弱审查和工具链的效果。建议将关注点转向更有意义的变更和项目健康信号。

items.title_en: ESP32-S31
items.title_zh: ESP32-S31 芯片
items.summary_en: Espressif's ESP32-S31 expands the low-power IoT SoC family with a focus on security and edge ML. The platform aims to deliver more secure, capable microcontrollers for smart devices, sensors, and wearables, broadening opportunities for on-device AI and encryption. As edge computing grows, S31 chips may accelerate privacy-preserving smart products.
items.summary_zh: Espressif 推出 ESP32-S31，扩展低功耗物联网系统芯片家族，强调安全性并支持边缘机器学习。该平台为智能设备、传感器和穿戴设备提供更安全、功能更强的微控制器，推动就地 AI 与加密能力。随着边缘计算兴起，S31 可能加速隐私保护型智能产品的落地。

items.title_en: Retro-Tech Parenting
items.title_zh: 复古科技育儿
items.summary_en: Retro technology is examined in the context of parenting, showing how older devices influence kids’ tech literacy and family routines. The piece weighs nostalgia against practicality as families reintroduce vintage gear into everyday life.
items.summary_zh: 在育儿语境下，讨论复古科技如何影响孩子的科技素养与家庭日常。文中权衡怀旧与实用性，探讨在日常生活中重新使用老式设备的利弊。

items.title_en: Larry Ellison: "Citizens will be on their best behavior because we’re recording"
items.title_zh: 拉里·埃利森：‘因为我们在记录，公民将行为最端正’
items.summary_en: Larry Ellison argues that constant recording will push citizens to behave better, framing surveillance as governance. The remark spotlights privacy trade-offs that tech platforms may need to navigate.
items.summary_zh: 埃利森表示持续记录会让公民表现得更好，把监控视为治理工具。这一说法凸显了科技平台在隐私与安全之间需要权衡的取舍。

items.title_en: Pokemon Emerald Ported to WebAssembly (100k FPS)
items.title_zh: 口袋妖怪绿宝石移植到 WebAssembly，帧率破万
items.summary_en: Porting Pokemon Emerald to WebAssembly demonstrates how WebAssembly can run performance-sensitive emulations in the browser at high frame rates. The project highlights the potential for retro-game experiences with near-native speed and raises questions about licensing, compatibility, and toolchains for WASM-based ports.
items.summary_zh: 将口袋妖怪绿宝石移植到 WebAssembly，表明网页端的高性能仿真有望实现接近原生的运行速度。该项目展示了复古游戏在浏览器中的潜力，同时引发对授权、兼容性与 WASM 移植工具链的讨论。

items.title_en: Moving beyond fork() + exec()
items.title_zh: 跳出 fork() 与 exec() 的进程创建方法
items.summary_en: Traditional fork/exec models remain standard but incur significant overhead and security risks. The discussion surveys modern alternatives for spawning processes, such as safer APIs, reduced duplication, and improved sandboxing. For developers, the takeaway is to rethink process creation strategy in runtime design and portability.
items.summary_zh: 传统的 fork/exec 模型仍然常用，但开销大且存在安全风险。文章考察了更现代的进程创建替代方案，如更安全的 API、减少重复创建以及改进沙箱化。开发者应重新评估运行时设计中的进程创建策略与可移植性。

items.title_en: PlayStation Architecture
items.title_zh: PlayStation 架构
items.summary_en: PlayStation architecture deep dive reveals Sony’s hardware choices across CPU, GPU, memory, and IO, with implications for game performance, dev tooling, and platform longevity.
items.summary_zh: PlayStation 架构的深入解析揭示了索尼在 CPU/GPU、内存和 I/O 等方面的硬件取舍，对游戏性能、开发工具链和平台生命周期有重要影响。

items.title_en: Should you normalize RGB values by 255 or 256?
items.title_zh: RGB 值应除以 255 还是 256？
items.summary_en: Explains the math behind normalizing 0–255 color channels to a 0–1 range and why dividing by 255 is usually preferable to 256. Highlights practical implications for image processing, neural networks, and color accuracy, including edge-case behavior at 255.
items.summary_zh: 解释将 0–255 的颜色通道归一化到 0–1 的数学原理，以及为何通常应使用 255 而非 256 进行除法。强调在图像处理、神经网络与色彩精度方面的实际影响，特别是对 255 的端点处理。

items.title_en: ChatGPT for Google Sheets exfiltrates workbooks
items.title_zh: Google 表格的 ChatGPT 插件可能外泄工作簿数据
items.summary_en: Running ChatGPT inside Google Sheets can inadvertently expose workbook content to the model, creating data leakage risks. This demonstrates how AI copilots can unintentionally exfiltrate sensitive data via prompts and interactions. It underscores the need for strict data governance and prompt-design safeguards when embedding AI in productivity tools.
items.summary_zh: 在 Google 表格中运行 ChatGPT 可能无意间将工作簿内容暴露给模型，带来数据外泄风险。这揭示了 AI 辅助工具在提示与交互中可能无意地外带敏感数据。强调在把 AI 嵌入生产力工具时，需加强数据治理与提示设计的防护。

items.title_en: Meta's ships facial recognition on smart glasses
items.title_zh: Meta 的智能眼镜搭载人脸识别
items.summary_en: Meta is shipping facial recognition capabilities on smart glasses, raising privacy and safety concerns about real-time person recognition in public spaces. The move has regulatory and ethical implications for wearables and social media.
items.summary_zh: Meta 在智能眼镜上引入人脸识别功能，引发对隐私和监控的担忧。此举对可穿戴设备的合规性、伦理问题以及公共场域的使用场景提出挑战。

items.title_en: A Post-Quantum Future for Let's Encrypt
items.title_zh: Let's Encrypt 的后量子时代
items.summary_en: Let's Encrypt outlines a plan for a post-quantum TLS ecosystem, including preparing for quantum-resistant certificates and hybrid crypto approaches. The move reflects the broader industry shift toward quantum-safe web security and the need for gradual crypto migrations without breaking existing sites.
items.summary_zh: Let’s Encrypt 发布后量子时代路线图，计划为 TLS 引入抗量子证书并采用混合加密策略。此举反映了行业向量子安全的转型，以及在不破坏现有网站的前提下逐步完成加密迁移的必要性。

items.title_en: Nvidia is proposing a beast of a CPU system for Windows PCs
items.title_zh: NVIDIA 为 Windows PC 提出一款强悍的 CPU 系统
items.summary_en: NVIDIA proposes a high-performance CPU system for Windows PCs, signaling a move beyond GPUs into desktop silicon. The concept hints at deep integration with Nvidia accelerators and software stacks, potentially boosting gaming, AI workloads, and content creation while challenging incumbents. If Windows compatibility and driver support align, it could reshape the PC hardware landscape.
items.summary_zh: 英伟达提出面向 Windows PC 的高性能 CPU 系统，标志着其在桌面硬件领域向 GPU 之外扩展的野心。该设想或将深度整合其加速器和软件生态，提升游戏、AI 与创作工作负载的性能，同时对现有厂商形成挑战。如若 Windows 兼容性和驱动生态配套到位，市场格局或将被重新塑造。

items.title_en: My thoughts after using Clojure for about a month
items.title_zh: 用了一个月 Clojure 的心得
items.summary_en: After a month using Clojure, the author notes a productive REPL-driven workflow and powerful macro system, but warns about onboarding friction for teams and the Java interop pitfalls. Clojure shines for concise, data-driven code yet demands discipline to maintain readability.
items.summary_zh: 作者用一个月的时间体验 Clojure，认为 REPL 驱动的工作流高效、宏系统强大，但对团队协作和 Java 互操作的学习成本需谨慎。Clojure 在数据驱动、简洁代码方面表现突出，但要保持代码可维护性需自律。

items.title_en: DuckDuckGo makes its 'no-AI' search engine easier to access as its traffic booms
items.title_zh: DuckDuckGo 在流量激增时让其无 AI 搜索引擎更易访问
items.summary_en: DuckDuckGo expands access to its no‑AI search engine as traffic climbs, illustrating demand for privacy-respecting results. The move positions DDG as a counterpoint to AI‑augmented search trends.
items.summary_zh: DuckDuckGo 在流量激增之际让其无 AI 的搜索引擎更易访问，体现用户对隐私、非 AI 助力结果的需求在上升。此举也为以隐私为卖点的搜索方案带来更广阔的触达。

items.title_en: London's Free Roof Terraces
items.title_zh: 伦敦的免费屋顶露台
items.summary_en: London's Free Roof Terraces highlights accessible rooftop spaces in the city, offering viewpoints over historic neighborhoods. It's a small lens on how cities can repurpose vertical space for public benefit.
items.summary_zh: 伦敦的免费屋顶露台介绍了城市中可公开进入的屋顶空间，提供历史景观的视角。 文章讨论此类露台如何提升城市生活，为公众提供绿色、共享的空间且无需收费。 这折射出城市在垂直空间利用方面的潜在方向。

items.title_en: Apple rejected my dictation app for using the accessibility API
items.title_zh: 苹果因使用无障碍 API 拒绝了我的听写应用
items.summary_en: An app developer details Apple's rejection of their dictation app due to using the accessibility API. The dispute highlights the friction between accessibility tooling and App Store review policies, and raises questions about how such APIs should be used by third-party apps.
items.summary_zh: 开发者因使用无障碍 API 的听写应用被苹果拒绝上线。这一事件揭示了无障碍工具与应用商店审核规则之间的摩擦，并引发对第三方应用如何正确使用此类 API 的讨论。

items.title_en: Stop Ruining It
items.title_zh: 别把好事毁了
items.summary_en: A concise admonition against feature creep and over-engineering; advocates preserving core value, user experience, and focus.
items.summary_zh: 作者呼吁避免功能膨胀和过度设计，强调要保留核心价值与良好用户体验，专注于真正重要的改进。

items.title_en: I tested every IP KVM in my Homelab
items.title_zh: 我在家庭实验室测试了所有 IP KVM
items.summary_en: I tested every IP KVM in my Homelab. A hands-on comparison of IP-based KVM switches for a home lab, evaluating latency, reliability, power, and automation compatibility. The post helps readers pick the right remote management hardware for their setups.
items.summary_zh: 作者在家庭实验室对所有 IP-KVM 进行实际测试，比较延迟、稳定性、功耗与自动化集成等方面的性能，帮助读者为自己的环境选到合适的远程管理硬件。

items.title_en: Meta enables ADB on deprecated Portal devices [video]
items.title_zh: Meta 在停用的 Portal 设备上启用 ADB（含视频）
items.summary_en: Meta has enabled ADB access on deprecated Portal devices, unlocking developer debugging and exploration even after official support ends. The move highlights the tension between device longevity and security, and shows how platforms balance openness with risk.
items.summary_zh: Meta 在已停产的 Portal 设备上开放 ADB 访问，允许开发者在官方支持结束后仍调试与改造设备。此举凸显设备寿命与安全之间的权衡，也展示了平台在停止官方支持后维持开放性的尝试。

items.title_en: Learn SQL Once, Use It for 30 Years
items.title_zh: 一次学会 SQL，30 年都能用
items.summary_en: A guide advocating deep mastery of SQL fundamentals, arguing that solid understanding of queries, joins, and data manipulation pays off for decades across DB systems. The piece emphasizes deliberate practice, real-world patterns, and continuous reuse.
items.summary_zh: 一篇倡导深入掌握 SQL 基本功的文章，认为对查询、联接和数据操作等要点的扎实理解能在未来几十年内在各数据库系统中持续受用。强调有目的的练习、实际模式与持续复用。

items.title_en: Show HN: Lathe – Use LLMs to learn a new domain, not skip past it
items.title_zh: Show HN：Lathe——用大模型深入学习新领域，而非走马观花
items.summary_en: Lathe uses LLMs to thoroughly learn a new domain rather than skimming it, enabling deeper understanding and reproducible workflows. This approach highlights how AI can augment genuine knowledge acquisition, not just search or prompt tailoring.
items.summary_zh: Lathe 通过大模型深入学习一个新领域，而不是走马观花，从而实现更深的理解和可重复的工作流。这显示了 AI 能力在真正的知识获取方面的潜力，而不仅仅是搜索或提示微调。

items.title_en: Meta launches Instagram, Facebook, and WhatsApp subscriptions
items.title_zh: Meta 推出 Instagram、Facebook 与 WhatsApp 订阅服务
items.summary_en: Meta officially rolls out paid subscriptions across its main apps, signaling a shift toward creator monetization and premium experiences. Coupled with forthcoming AI features, the move hints at how social platforms may balance revenue, user value, and data use going forward.
items.summary_zh: Meta 正式在旗下应用推出付费订阅，标志着向创作者变现和更高端体验的转型。再加上未来的 AI 功能，这一举措暗示了社交平台在未来如何平衡收入、用户价值与数据使用。

items.title_en: Dutch gov't will only allow European company to operate DigiD platform
items.title_zh: 荷兰政府将仅允许欧洲公司运营 DigiD 平台
items.summary_en: Netherlands will restrict DigiD platform operation to a European company, tightening control over a critical digital identity service. The move aims to enhance data sovereignty, security, and compliance with EU privacy norms, possibly in response to concerns about foreign ownership. For tech vendors and public-sector teams, it signals tougher procurement and vendor eligibility criteria for national infrastructure.
items.summary_zh: 荷兰将 DigiD 平台的运营权限定为欧洲公司，增强关键数字身份服务的主权和安全性。此举意在提升数据所在地区的控制力和合规性，或回应对外国所有权的担忧。对技术供应商和公共部门团队而言，意味着国家基础设施的采购和准入标准将更加严格。

items.title_en: I design with Claude more than Figma now
items.title_zh: 我现在用 Claude 设计多于 Figma
items.summary_en: Jane Street’s design workflow increasingly relies on Claude to ideate and iterate designs, surpassing traditional Figma reliance. The author notes Claude’s reasoning and code-assisted capabilities speed up layout and prototype work, though human oversight remains essential for visual polish.
items.summary_zh: Jane Street 的设计流程越来越多地借助 Claude 来构思和迭代设计，甚至超过了对 Figma 的依赖。文章指出在文本驱动设计与原型实现中，Claude 的推理与代码能力能显著提速，但仍需人工把控视觉细节。

items.title_en: Mathematicians issue warning as AI rapidly gains ground
items.title_zh: Mathematicians issue warning as AI rapidly gains ground
items.summary_en: Mathematicians warn that AI progress is accelerating beyond current theory and verification methods. The piece calls for deeper mathematical foundations for AI safety, formal verification, and robust governance as models scale. The takeaway is a push for rigorous math to back reliable AI deployment.
items.summary_zh: 数学家警告人工智能的进展正在快速超出现有理论与验证手段的能力。文章呼吁在 AI 安全、形式化验证和治理方面建立更扎实的数学基础，以应对大规模模型带来的新挑战。

items.title_en: Harness engineering: Leveraging Codex in an agent-first world
items.title_zh: Harness 工程：在以代理为先的世界中如何充分利用 Codex
items.summary_en: OpenAI outlines harness engineering as a discipline for building safer, controllable AI agents, using Codex-like models to implement actions, plans, and interfaces. The article argues that well-designed harnesses are essential to reliable agent behavior and debugging.
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 提出 harness engineering 作为构建可控 AI 代理的学科，利用像 Codex 这样的模型实现行动、计划和接口。文章强调，良好设计的 harness 对代理行为的可靠性与调试至关重要。

items.title_en: Debug Project
items.title_zh: 调试项目
items.summary_en: A project centered on debugging software workflows and issues, likely offering new tools or methodologies to diagnose and fix bugs.
items.summary_zh: 一个聚焦调试软件工作流与问题的项目，可能提供新工具或方法来诊断并修复错误。

items.title_en: Google to pay SpaceX $920M a month for compute capacity at xAI data centers
items.title_zh: 谷歌将向 SpaceX 支付 9.2 亿美元/月用于 xAI 数据中心
items.summary_en: Google is paying SpaceX about $920 million per month for compute capacity at SpaceX's xAI data centers, signaling the scale of demand for AI infrastructure and possible long-term partnerships between hyperscalers.
items.summary_zh: 谷歌为 xAI 数据中心的计算资源向 SpaceX 支付约9.2亿美元/月，凸显 AI 基础设施的规模需求以及潜在的超大规模云厂商间的长期合作。

items.title_en: Show HN: Eyeball
items.title_zh: Show HN：Eyeball
items.summary_en: Show HN: Eyeball
items.summary_zh: Show HN：Eyeball

items.title_en: Three of our worst VC stories
items.title_zh: 我们的三个最糟 VC 故事
items.summary_en: A thread sharing three regrettable VC experiences, illustrating misaligned incentives, bad due diligence, and the harsh realities of startup funding. It offers cautionary lessons for founders.
items.summary_zh: 这条推文讲述了三段关于风险投资的糟糕经历，揭示激励错位、尽调失效等现实问题，并为创始人提供了警示性教训。

items.title_en: Open Code Review – An AI-powered code review CLI tool
items.title_zh: Open Code Review：一个 AI 驱动的代码评审命令行工具
items.summary_en: Alibaba's Open Code Review is a CLI tool that uses AI to assist code reviews, potentially accelerating feedback cycles and surfacing issues developers might miss. It reflects a broader trend of AI copilots embedded directly into tooling.
items.summary_zh: Open Code Review 提供一个 AI 驱动的代码评审 CLI 工具，或将加速评审流程并发现开发者易错之处。此类工具代表开发者工具向终端 AI 助手的趋势。

items.title_en: I'm skeptical about efforts to revolutionize schooling
items.title_zh: 我对改革教育的努力持怀疑态度
items.summary_en: Scott Young questions the hype around tech-driven schooling reforms, arguing that real progress requires evidence-based, scalable changes rather than flashy interventions. He emphasizes fundamentals like pedagogy, assessment, and equitable access.
items.summary_zh: 作者对以科技手段彻底改造教育的热潮持怀疑态度，主张以证据为基础推进改革。强调改革应着眼于课程、师资培训、教育公平等根本问题，而非追逐新潮工具。

items.title_en: Florida sues OpenAI and Sam Altman over AI risks
items.title_zh: 佛州就AI风险起诉OpenAI及Altman
items.summary_en: Florida filed a lawsuit against OpenAI and CEO Sam Altman alleging that the company's AI products pose risks and misrepresent safety measures. The case adds to growing regulatory scrutiny of AI technologies and could influence how consumer-protection standards are enforced for AI services. The outcome may set a precedent for accountability in AI safety claims.
items.summary_zh: 佛州针对OpenAI及首席执行官萨姆·奥特曼提起诉讼，指控其AI产品存在风险并误导安全承诺。此案反映出日益严厉的AI监管态势，可能影响对AI服务的消费者保护标准执行，并或为AI安全承诺设定先例。

items.title_en: Microsoft builds MacBook Pro rival with NVIDIA-powered Surface Laptop Ultra
items.title_zh: 微软打造搭载 NVIDIA 的 Surface Laptop Ultra，欲挑战 MacBook Pro
items.summary_en: Microsoft is developing a premium Surface Laptop Ultra powered by NVIDIA GPUs to compete with the MacBook Pro. The project signals a stronger emphasis on high-end laptops for professional workloads, including graphics and AI-assisted tasks. If successful, it could shift hardware competitiveness in the Windows ecosystem toward creator-focused configurations.
items.summary_zh: 微软正在开发搭载 NVIDIA 显卡的高端 Surface Laptop Ultra，以与 MacBook Pro 竞争。该计划凸显对专业工作负载的高端笔记本需求，涵盖图形和 AI 辅助任务。若成型，将可能提升 Windows 生态在面向创作者的硬件配置方面的竞争力。

items.title_en: What appear to be biochemical processes may be a natural feature of geology
items.title_zh: 看似生化过程其实是地质的自然特征
items.summary_en: Researchers argue that some biochemical-like processes can arise from geological conditions, complicating interpretations of life signals. The finding urges caution when distinguishing biotic versus abiotic signals in geochemistry and astrobiology, with implications for how we search for life on other worlds. This work underscores the need for robust, multi-faceted evidence when assessing potential biosignatures.
items.summary_zh: 研究者认为某些看似生物的化学过程其实来自地质条件，这使对生命信号的解读变得更复杂。在地球化学和天体生物学中区分生物信号与非生物信号需要更谨慎，这对在其他世界寻找生命痕迹具有重要影响。该研究强调在评估潜在生物标志时需依赖多层次证据。

items.title_en: Major P2P issues in Israel and possibly other Middle East countries
items.title_zh: 以色列及其他中东地区的主要P2P问题
items.summary_en: It underscores the fragility of P2P under restrictive networks and the need for fallback strategies.
items.summary_zh: 文中讨论了以色列及其他中东地区的实际点对点网络问题，如 NAT 穿透、对称性防火墙与连通性限制，影响多人游戏等 P2P 应用的表现。强调在受限网络环境下 P2P 的脆弱性，并提出需要回退策略与改进的连接方案。

items.title_en: Every Byte Matters
items.title_zh: 每一个字节都很重要
items.summary_en: Every byte counts in modern systems, affecting latency, energy use, privacy, and costs. The piece argues for smarter data practices as a competitive advantage.
items.summary_zh: 在现代系统中，每一个字节都至关重要，关系到延迟、能耗、隐私和成本。文章主张通过更高效的数据实践获得竞争优势。

items.title_en: Zeroserve: A zero-config web server you can script with eBPF
items.title_zh: Zeroserve：一个零配置、可用 eBPF 脚本化的 Web 服务器
items.summary_en: Zeroserve is a zero-config web server you can script with eBPF. It lets you inject custom behavior using eBPF programs, enabling dynamic routing, metrics, and security with low overhead. This approach could lower the barrier to deploying flexible, observable services.
items.summary_zh: Zeroserve 是一个零配置的 Web 服务器，支持通过 eBPF 脚本化自定义行为。借助内核级的可编程能力，它可在边缘进行流量路由、监控和访问控制等定制，而无需繁琐的配置。这样的设计降低了部署动态、可观测服务的门槛，提升灵活性和性能边界。

items.title_en: Muxcard, a DIY credit card size computer
items.title_zh: Muxcard：一个自制的信用卡大小计算机
items.summary_en: Muxcard is a DIY, credit-card-sized computer project that aims to be a portable, hackable development board. It emphasizes compact form factor while offering entry-level tooling and expandability for hobbyists. The project fits into the ongoing trend of pocketable computing devices for learning and prototype hardware.
items.summary_zh: Muxcard 是一个自制的信用卡大小的计算机项目，旨在提供便携且可黑客化的开发板。其在紧凑体积的同时提供入门级的工具链与扩展性，面向爱好者进行学习与原型开发。这一设计体现了便携计算设备的持续热潮。

items.title_en: South Korean forums will need to scan every images with AI censorship tools
items.title_zh: 韩国论坛将全面使用 AI 审查工具扫描图片
items.summary_en: South Korea considers mandating AI-based image censorship scans across online forums, raising concerns about privacy, censorship, and platform responsibility. The move could reshape how communities moderate content.
items.summary_zh: 韩国拟要求论坛全面使用 AI 审查工具对图片进行筛查，涉及隐私、内容监管与平台责任等争议。

items.title_en: Show HN: Edsger – A handwritten Clojure REPL for the reMarkable 2
items.title_zh: Show HN：在 reMarkable 2 上运行的手写 Clojure REPL（Edsger）
items.summary_en: An experimental project ships a handwritten Clojure REPL on the reMarkable 2, letting you type and evaluate Clojure code directly on the e-ink device. It demonstrates how lightweight, on-device tooling can enable interactive programming far from a traditional IDE, even on constrained hardware. Proof-of-concept for embedding REPLs on unusual hardware.
items.summary_zh: 该项目把 Clojure 的手写 REPL 移植到 reMarkable 2，让在电子墨水设备上直接输入并执行代码成为可能。它展示了在资源受限设备上实现交互式编程的潜力，以及在极简硬件上的在地开发工具。

items.title_en: Scientists ejected from diabetes conference for distributing journal reprints
items.title_zh: 科学家因分发期刊重印件被糖尿病会议驱逐
items.summary_en: Scientists were ejected from a diabetes conference for distributing journal reprints, highlighting tensions between open access and conference norms. The incident underscores ongoing debates about accessibility of research versus copyright and conference control.
items.summary_zh: 科学家因分发期刊重印件被糖尿病会议驱逐，暴露出开放获取与会议规范之间的紧张关系。此事凸显了研究可及性与版权、以及会议掌控之间的持续辩论。

items.title_en: Alphabet announces $80B equity capital raise to expand AI infra and compute
items.title_zh: Alphabet宣布800亿美元股权融资以扩展AI基础设施与算力
items.summary_en: Alphabet plans to raise about $80B in equity to fund AI infrastructure and compute capacity, signaling continued scale-up of its AI platforms and data-center footprint. The move highlights the capital-intensive nature of modern AI at scale and could influence strategic investments across cloud and hardware ecosystems. Expect further expansion of Google's AI tooling, services, and partnerships.
items.summary_zh: Alphabet计划筹集约800亿美元股本，以资助AI基础设施与算力扩展，显示其AI平台和数据中心规模化的持续增速。这一举措凸显大规模AI的高资本需求，可能影响云服务和硬件生态圈的战略投资。未来Google的AI工具、服务与合作关系预计将进一步扩张。

items.title_en: The intracies of modern camera lens repair (2024)
items.title_zh: 现代相机镜头维修的复杂性（2024）
items.summary_en: It delves into the hidden mechanics of repairing modern camera lenses—from tiny screws and tolerances to coatings and electronic interactions—that complicate field fixes. It also explains why repairability matters for sustainability and cost in 2024's camera ecosystem.
items.summary_zh: 文章深入探讨现代镜头修复的隐性机制，覆盖小螺丝、公差、涂层以及与传感器的微观交互等，解释这些因素为何让现场维修变得复杂。并指出修复能力对 2024 年相机生态的可持续性与成本的重要性。

items.title_en: GitHub and the crime against software
items.title_zh: GitHub 与对软件的犯罪
items.summary_en: Argues that GitHub's culture and tooling enable lax licensing and diffusion of copyrighted code, which the author calls a 'crime against software.' The piece calls for clearer licenses, provenance tracking, and stronger attribution practices to restore incentives for proper software stewardship.
items.summary_zh: 认为 GitHub 的文化与工具链放任许可宽松、作品代码的扩散，构成对软件的“犯罪行为”。呼吁更清晰的许可、源流跟踪与更强的署名规范，以恢复对软件所有权与治理的正确激励。

items.title_en: The advertising cartel coming to your web browser
items.title_zh: 广告寡头将进入你的网页浏览器
items.summary_en: A provocative analysis argues that ad tech cartels are consolidating control at the browser level, raising concerns about privacy, interoperability, and user experience.
items.summary_zh: 一篇分析指出广告科技寡头正在浏览器层面形成更强的垄断，带来隐私、互通性和用户体验方面的担忧。文章探讨浏览器厂商与监管者可能采取的对策。

items.title_en: KDE at 30
items.title_zh: KDE 三十周年
items.summary_en: KDE marks 30 years of open‑source desktop work, highlighting its impact on user interfaces, Linux ecosystems, and community‑driven software. The milestone invites reflection on sustainability and future directions for desktop environments.
items.summary_zh: KDE 迎来三十周年，回顾开源桌面生态的影响、用户体验和社区驱动的软件发展。 milestone 也为未来的桌面环境方向带来反思。

items.title_en: Restartable Sequences
items.title_zh: 可重启序列（Restartable Sequences）
items.summary_en: Restartable Sequences (rseq) is a Linux kernel feature that lets a thread execute a tiny critical section and restart safely if interrupted, reducing costly synchronization. The piece outlines how rseq enables fast-path code and where it fits in performance-sensitive apps, with caveats around portability and safety.
items.summary_zh: Restartable Sequences（rseq）是一个 Linux 内核特性，允许线程在被中断时安全地重启极小的临界区，从而降低同步成本。文章解释了 rseq 如何让快速路径代码更高效，以及在对性能敏感的应用中的适用场景，同时也提示了可移植性与安全性方面的注意。

items.title_en: Deflock hits 100k ALPRs Mapped in USA
items.title_zh: Deflock 将美国 10 万 ALPR 数据制成地图
items.summary_en: Deflock mapped 100,000 ALPR cameras across the United States, revealing distribution patterns and the scale of automated surveillance. The visualization raises questions about privacy, governance, and the reach of law enforcement tech.
items.summary_zh: Deflock 已将美国境内十万台 ALPR 摄像头的位置绘制成地图，呈现出区域分布与监控覆盖的规模。可视化数据引发对隐私、治理及执法技术影响的讨论。

items.title_en: Trump signs downsized AI order after weeks of reversals
items.title_zh: 特朗普在多周变动后签署缩减版 AI 命令
items.summary_en: Trump signs a downsized AI order after weeks of reversals, signaling a pared-back but still strategic stance on AI governance. The move focuses on national security, workforce reskilling, and research priorities.
items.summary_zh: 特朗普在多轮改变后签署了一份缩减版的 AI 指令，尽管规模减小，但仍体现对 AI governance 的战略关注，聚焦国家安全、劳动力再培训与研究优先级。

items.title_en: Decades of Effort Restore Steelhead and Salmon Passage on Alameda Creek
items.title_zh: 数十年努力重建阿拉梅达溪的钢头鲑鱼回游通道
items.summary_en: Over decades, agencies and communities removed barriers and restored habitat to reopen steelhead and salmon migrations on California's Alameda Creek. The effort improves biodiversity, supports endangered species recovery, and demonstrates scalable approaches for river restoration.
items.summary_zh: 数十年来，相关机构与社区清除阻碍、修复栖息地，使阿拉梅达溪的钢头鲑和鲑鱼能够重新回游。该工程提升了生物多样性，助力濒危物种恢复，并展示了可扩展的河流修复方法。

items.title_en: India's surprise baby bust
items.title_zh: 印度意外出生率下降
items.summary_en: Economist reports India's birth rate declined unexpectedly, signaling potential shifts in the demographic dividend and implications for labor supply, growth, and global population trends.
items.summary_zh: 经济学人报道印度出生率意外下降，可能改变人口红利格局，对劳动力供给、经济增长及全球人口趋势带来影响。

items.title_en: The Public Should Own Half of the Big A.I. Companies
items.title_zh: 公众应拥有大 AI 公司的一半股权
items.summary_en: The op-ed argues that public ownership of half of the largest AI firms would curb concentration of power and ensure society captures a fair share of AI's gains. It sketches mechanisms like public investment or governance rights to democratize control, and discusses potential risks and implementation challenges.
items.summary_zh: 这篇社论主张公众应持有大型 AI 公司的一半股权，以遏制权力集中并确保社会分享 AI 的收益。文中提出通过公共投资基金或治理权等机制实现公众参与，并讨论实施中的权衡与风险。

items.title_en: Three Ways to Get Paid (2018)
items.title_zh: 三种获得报酬的方式（2018）
items.summary_en: Jason Zweig outlines three core ways people earn money: wages, investments, and owning income-producing assets. The piece blends practical finance tips with historical context to broaden how we think about compensation beyond salary.
items.summary_zh: 作者 Jason Zweig 指出三种核心赚钱方式：工资、投资，以及拥有带来收益的资产。文中将实用的理财要点与历史背景结合，帮助读者把工资以外的报酬纳入考量。

items.title_en: I made my phone slow on purpose
items.title_zh: 我故意让手机变慢
items.summary_en: Describes experimenting with throttling performance to observe how devices behave under constrained resources. The piece offers insights into how throttling affects usability, battery life, and privacy considerations.
items.summary_zh: 作者分享了故意让手机变慢的实验，观察资源受限下的可用性、电池续航与隐私影响。给出对系统节流如何改变应用行为与用户体验的洞察。

items.title_en: Pluto.jl 1.0 release – reactive notebook for Julia
items.title_zh: Pluto.jl 1.0 发布：面向 Julia 的反应式笔记本
items.summary_en: Pluto.jl 1.0 delivers a reactive notebook for Julia with dependency-aware execution and reproducibility. The release lowers the barrier to interactive data exploration and teaching in Julia.
items.summary_zh: Pluto.jl 1.0 推出，提供面向 Julia 的完全反应式笔记本，具备对依赖关系的自动跟踪与可重复执行性。该版本降低了交互式数据探索的门槛，便于教学与研究使用。

items.title_en: Show HN: Uruky (EU-based Kagi alternative) now has Image Search and URL Rewrites
items.title_zh: Show HN：Uruky——面向欧盟的 Kagi 替代，现已支持图片搜索与 URL 重写
items.summary_en: Uruky, a EU-based alternative to Kagi, introduced Image Search and URL Rewrite features, expanding its feature set as a privacy-focused search option. The release highlights how EU-based independents continue to compete with larger incumbents by adding more useful tooling for developers and power users.
items.summary_zh: Uruky 作为基于欧盟的 Kagi 替代，新增图片搜索与 URL 重写功能，扩展了其隐私导向搜索的功能集。此次更新显示，基于欧盟的独立搜索引擎正通过增加实用工具来与大型对手竞争，服务开发者与高阶用户。

items.title_en: The ways we contain Claude across products
items.title_zh: 我们在各产品中对 Claude 的 containment 方法
items.summary_en: Across products, we implement multiple containment layers for Claude: guardrails, input filtering, rate limits, and a policy-driven oversight model. The goal is to prevent unsafe outputs while preserving useful capabilities.
items.summary_zh: 在各产品中对 Claude 的 containment 包括多层安全策略、输入输出过滤、速率限流与策略治理等。目标是在保留有用功能的同时尽量避免不安全输出。

items.title_en: Coreutils for Windows
items.title_zh: Windows 版 Coreutils
items.summary_en: Coreutils for Windows brings GNU utilities like ls and cp to Windows native, streamlining cross-platform scripting without relying on WSL or Cygwin.
items.summary_zh: Windows 版 Coreutils 将 GNU 工具（如 ls、cp）原生带到 Windows，简化跨平台脚本和开发工作，无需依赖 WSL 或 Cygwin。

items.title_en: Ask HN: Who is hiring? (June 2026)
items.title_zh: Ask HN：谁在招人？（2026 年 6 月）
items.summary_en: Compiles current tech job openings and hiring signals from early-stage startups to big tech, with emphasis on remote-friendly roles and cross-disciplinary opportunities.
items.summary_zh: 汇总最新技术岗位的招聘信息与信号，覆盖初创公司到大型企业，重点关注远程友好和跨学科岗位。

items.title_en: Odysseus – self-hosted AI workspace
items.title_zh: Odysseus — 自托管的 AI 工作区
items.summary_en: Odysseus provides a self-hosted AI workspace for teams to manage models and experiments locally, emphasizing privacy, reproducibility, and control. It appeals to developers seeking to avoid vendor lock-in and data leaving their environment.
items.summary_zh: Odysseus 提供一个面向团队的自托管 AI 工作区，便于在本地管理模型与实验，强调隐私、可重复性和对环境的控制。适合希望避免厂商锁定与数据外流的开发者。

items.title_en: Public Domain Image Archive
items.title_zh: 公共领域图像档案库
items.summary_en: A new public domain image archive consolidates freely reusable visuals for developers and creators. The collection lowers licensing friction for prototyping, education, and open-source projects.
items.summary_zh: 一个新的公共领域图像档案库汇集了可自由再用的视觉素材，降低了原型设计、教育与开源项目的许可门槛。

items.title_en: Only 17% of all 64-bit Integers are products of two 32-bit integers
items.title_zh: 只有 64 位整数中有 17% 可以分解为两个 32 位整数的乘积
items.summary_en: Presents a number-theory result: only about 17% of 64-bit integers admit a factorization into two 32-bit factors; discusses consequences for algorithm design, randomization, and cryptography.
items.summary_zh: 给出一个数论结果：约 17% 的 64 位整数可以分解为两个 32 位因子的乘积；讨论对算法设计、随机化以及密码学的影响。

items.title_en: Preparing for KDE Plasma's Last X11-Supported Release
items.title_zh: 为 KDE Plasma 的最后一个支持 X11 的版本做准备
items.summary_en: KDE Plasma is approaching its final release that supports X11; users and developers should prepare for the transition to Wayland, including app compatibility and workflow changes.
items.summary_zh: KDE Plasma 将迎来最后一个支持 X11 的版本，用户和开发者需为向 Wayland 的迁移做准备，关注应用兼容性和工作流的改变。

items.title_en: 'Backrooms' Stuns with $81M Debut
items.title_zh: 《Backrooms》凭借8100万美元的首映票房，显示强劲市场
items.summary_en: Backrooms opens with $81M, signaling a strong debut for a mid‑budget horror title. The result underscores continued appetite for theatrical releases and IP‑driven momentum even as streaming competes for attention.
items.summary_zh: 《Backrooms》凭借8100万美元的首映票房，显示中等预算恐怖片仍具吸引力。说明在流媒体竞争激烈的环境下，影院上映仍能带来强劲的市场回报，尤其在知名 IP 的带动下。

items.title_en: I built a ceiling projection mapping of the planes flying over my house
items.title_zh: 我为家中上空经过的飞机做了天花板投影映射
items.summary_en: An inventive home project that maps the takeoff path of planes overhead into a ceiling projection mapping. The creator uses real-time flight data and projection techniques to turn air traffic into a visual art piece, highlighting maker culture and data visualization in everyday life.
items.summary_zh: 通过天花板投影映射，将家中上空经过的飞机起飞轨迹变成一件艺术作品。创作者结合实时航班数据与投影技术，将空中交通转化为可视化艺术，展示了日常生活中的创客精神与数据可视化的魅力。

items.title_en: Stop Killing Games
items.title_zh: 停止扼杀游戏体验
items.summary_en: A manifesto arguing for game designs that respect player agency and long-term engagement rather than hollow trends that kill the game's vitality.
items.summary_zh: 一本呼吁回归玩家主导、注重长期体验的游戏设计宣言，拒绝削弱玩家体验的商业做法或强制性机制。

items.title_en: My Agent Skill for Test-Driven Development
items.title_zh: 用于测试驱动开发的代理技能
items.summary_en: Introduces an agent-centric approach to test-driven development, where automated agents assist with scaffolding tests and driving development cycles. The approach can accelerate workflow but requires discipline to avoid over-reliance.
items.summary_zh: 提出了一种面向代理的测试驱动开发方法，由自动代理协助生成测试和推动开发循环。此思路能提升工作流效率，但也需警惕对 AI 代理的过度依赖。

items.title_en: Ultra-processed foods in the global food system: The role of tobacco companies
items.title_zh: 全球食品体系中的超加工食品：烟草公司的角色
items.summary_en: The piece analyzes how tobacco companies increasingly participate in ultra-processed foods to diversify revenue. It traces marketing tactics, lobbying, and regulatory vulnerabilities, underscoring public health implications and the need for tighter oversight.
items.summary_zh: 文章分析烟草公司如何通过进入超加工食品领域多元化收入来源，追踪其营销手段、游说活动以及监管漏洞，强调对公众健康的影响并呼吁加强监管。

items.title_en: Do transformers need three projections? Systematic study of QKV variants
items.title_zh: Transformer 是否需要三重投影？对 QKV 变体的系统研究
items.summary_en: The study systematically compares QKV variants to see whether transformers truly require three separate projections. Results illuminate whether shared projections can match accuracy with less compute, impacting design choices for future models.
items.summary_zh: 该论文系统性比较了 QKV 变体，探讨变换器是否真的需要三个独立的投影。结果为未来模型在准确性与计算成本之间的权衡提供实证依据。

items.title_en: New U.S. college grads now have higher unemployment than the average worker
items.title_zh: 新近美国高校毕业生的失业率现在高于全国平均水平
items.summary_en: New graduates are facing unemployment rates higher than the overall average, underscoring a softer entry-level job market and persistent macro headwinds. This trend could temper early-career hiring, salary growth, and the overall pace of tech industry onboarding for the next wave of graduates.
items.summary_zh: 新毕业生的失业率高于全国平均水平，体现入门级就业市场疲软和宏观因素的持续影响。这一趋势可能抑制科技行业的初期招聘、薪资增长以及新一代毕业生的职业起步速度。

items.title_en: The Smart TV in Your LivingRoom Is a Node in the AIScraping Economy
items.title_zh: 你家客厅的智能电视正成为AI抓取生态的一环
items.summary_en: Your living-room smart TV is quietly contributing data to a broader AI-scraping ecosystem, potentially used for training datasets. The reality raises privacy and consent questions as consumer devices become data sources, prompting scrutiny of data practices in the home.
items.summary_zh: 你家客厅的智能电视正在悄然成为AI抓取生态的一环，可能被用于训练数据集。随着家用设备成为数据源，这引发隐私与同意等问题，促使人们审视家庭数据的使用方式。

items.title_en: Morningstar values SpaceX at $780B, half its IPO target
items.title_zh: 晨星将 SpaceX 估值至7800亿美元，为 IPO 目标的一半
items.summary_en: Morningstar pegs SpaceX at about $780B, roughly half its rumored IPO target, illustrating how private market enthusiasm and public-market expectations diverge. The valuation signals investor fever for space tech even as the company remains private.
items.summary_zh: 晨星评 SpaceX 约7800亿美元的估值，约为传闻中的 IPO 目标的一半，体现私募热潮与公开市场预期的分歧。此估值反映出投资者对航天科技的热情，即便公司尚未上市。

items.title_en: Redis 8.8: New array data structure, rate limiter, performance improvements
items.title_zh: Redis 8.8：新增数组结构、速率限制器与性能提升
items.summary_en: Redis 8.8 ships with a new array data structure, a built-in rate limiter, and various performance improvements. These changes simplify data modeling, improve traffic control, and boost overall throughput for apps relying on Redis.
items.summary_zh: Redis 8.8 发布，新增数组数据结构、内置速率限制器，以及多项性能改进。这些改动简化数据建模、提升流控能力，并提高对 Redis 依赖的应用的整体吞吐。

items.title_en: Atherton spent $145K to delay train electrification. The rest of us paid $400M
items.title_zh: 阿瑟顿花费 14.5 万美元拖延 Caltrain 电气化，其余人花费 4 亿美元并多等 3 年
items.summary_en: A local political decision reveals how small-budget lobbying can delay infrastructure electrification, shifting costs to the broader public: a $400M hit and three more years of delay. The piece shows how local decision-making can influence tech adoption and climate goals.
items.summary_zh: 地方政治人物花费14.5万美元拖延 Caltrain 电气化，而大众则承担约4亿美元的成本并多等3年。这个案例揭示了地方决策如何影响技术普及与气候目标的实现。

items.title_en: HP re-releases classic computer science calculator: The HP-16C
items.title_zh: HP 重新推出经典计算器：HP-16C 收藏版
items.summary_en: HP re-releases the classic HP-16C calculator in a collectors edition, reviving a beloved tool for engineers and enthusiasts. The revival nods to enduring interest in vintage hardware and precise numerical workflows.
items.summary_zh: HP 重新推出经典的 HP-16C 计算器收藏版，重现了这款长期受工程师和爱好者欢迎的工具。复刻体现了对传统硬件与精确数值工作流的持续热爱。

items.title_en: Agentic Mfw
items.title_zh: 代理性 Mfw
items.summary_en: A provocative look at agency in technology, examining how autonomous systems influence human decision-making and how people in turn shape machine behavior. The discussion emphasizes power and trust in human–machine collaboration.
items.summary_zh: 对科技中的代理性进行挑衅性讨论，探究自主系统如何影响人类决策，以及人们又如何塑造机器行为。讨论强调人机协作中的权力与信任问题。

items.title_en: Branchless Quicksort faster than std:sort and pdqsort with C and C++ API
items.title_zh: 无分支快速排序比 std::sort 与 pdqsort 更快（C/C++ API）
items.summary_en: A branchless quicksort implementation claims to outperform std::sort and pdqsort by reducing branches, especially on large datasets. The post presents benchmarks and discusses portability and practical adoption considerations.
items.summary_zh: 无分支快速排序实现声称通过减少分支来超过 std::sort 与 pdqsort 的性能，尤其在处理大数据集时。文中给出基准对比，并讨论可移植性和实际落地的权衡。

items.title_en: DeepSeek V4 Pro beats GPT-5.5 Pro on precision
items.title_zh: DeepSeek V4 Pro 在精度上胜过 GPT-5.5 Pro
items.summary_en: DeepSeek V4 Pro claims higher precision than GPT-5.5 Pro in benchmark tasks, signaling improvements in dedicated AI tooling. The claim invites scrutiny of evaluation methods and raises questions about when proprietary vs open models trade accuracy for safety and speed.
items.summary_zh: DeepSeek V4 Pro 在基准测试中声称在精度上超越 GPT-5.5 Pro，显示在专用工具上的改进。这一说法需要审视评测方法，并引发关于专有与开源模型在准确性、安全性与性能之间权衡的问题。

items.title_en: Sagrada Família Lego set
items.title_zh: 乐高 Sagrada Família 拼装套装
items.summary_en: LEGO released a Sagrada Família set (21065) that recreates Gaudí's iconic basilica in intricate bricks. The model captures Gaudí’s curves and details, appealing to architecture fans and adult builders. It sits within LEGO's architecture-inspired line.
items.summary_zh: 乐高推出了 21065 号 Sagrada Família 拼装套装，仿照高迪著名的圣家堂以精美的积木重现。模型精准还原曲线与细节，吸引建筑爱好者和成年搭建者；此套装也体现了乐高建筑风格序列的延展。

items.title_en: Legal action forces Facebook whistleblower to sit in silence at Hay festival
items.title_zh: 法律行动迫使 Facebook 内部告密者在 Hay Festival 保持沉默
items.summary_en: A Facebook whistleblower was silenced by legal action at Hay Festival, underscoring how litigation can chill tech accountability narratives. The episode raises questions about transparency, rights to speak, and public discussion.
items.summary_zh: 在海伊节上，一名 Facebook 告密者被法律行动迫使保持沉默，凸显诉讼对科技问责叙事的约束效应。事件引发对透明度、言论权与公众讨论的思考。

items.title_en: Show HN: I reverse-engineered the world maps of Test Drive III (1990 DOS game)
items.title_zh: Show HN：我逆向还原了 1990 年 DOS 游戏 Test Drive III 的世界地图
items.summary_en: I reverse-engineered the world maps of Test Drive III (1990 DOS game) to produce a machine-readable map dataset. The work reveals how classic games encoded level layouts and provides a model for preserving and exploring old software.
items.summary_zh: 我逆向还原了 1990 年 DOS 游戏 Test Drive III 的世界地图，生成了可机器读取的地图数据。这项工作揭示了经典游戏如何对关卡布局进行编码，并为保存与再现老游戏提供了有价值的参考。

items.title_en: Azure Linux 4.0 is Microsoft's first general-purpose Linux
items.title_zh: Azure Linux 4.0：微软的首个通用用途 Linux
items.summary_en: Azure Linux 4.0 marks Microsoft's first general-purpose Linux distribution, signaling deeper Linux-cloud integration for Azure. It could influence how enterprises think about OS choices for cloud-native workloads and cross-platform tooling.
items.summary_zh: Azure Linux 4.0 标志着微软首次推出面向广泛用途的 Linux 发行版，旨在支撑 Azure 的云端与边缘工作负载。该举动可能促使企业在云原生场景中的操作系统选择更偏向 Linux，并影响跨平台工具链的发展。

items.title_en: Show HN: I Derived a Pancake
items.title_zh: Show HN：我推导出一个煎饼配方
items.summary_en: A Show HN sharing a derivation-based approach to making pancakes, turning a kitchen recipe into a reproducible, nerdy process. It demonstrates how systematic thinking can yield predictable texture and flavor outcomes, even for everyday cooking.
items.summary_zh: 该 Show HN 展示了一种以推导和实验为基础的煎饼配方设计，给出可重复的步骤和参数。它证明将系统化思考应用于日常烹饪也能带来可预测的口感与口味。

items.title_en: Making peace with your unlived dreams (2023)
items.title_zh: 与未实现的梦想和解
items.summary_en: Making Peace with Your Unlived Dreams explores accepting unpursued paths while focusing energy on meaningful goals. It encourages reframing setbacks as part of growth and using intentional choices to move forward. A mindful take on ambition and contentment in tech life.
items.summary_zh: 这是一篇关于与尚未实现的梦想和解的反思文章，倡导承认未实现的可能性并把精力放在真正重要的目标上。文中提供将挫折视为成长过程的一部分的思考与建议。

items.title_en: How we index images for RAG
items.title_zh: 我们如何为 RAG 索引图像
items.summary_en: A deep dive into image indexing for Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) reveals practical strategies for embedding, similarity search, and multi-modal retrieval to speed up accurate visual retrieval in AI chats.
items.summary_zh: 深入探讨用于检索增强生成（RAG）的图像索引，揭示嵌入、相似性搜索和多模态检索等实用策略，以提升在 AI 聊天中对视觉信息的准确检索速度。
