This can enhance security, determinism, and portability for edge workloads and plugin ecosystems. It signals a trend toward reusable, privacy-preserving runtimes.
items.summary_zh: Kyushu 提供一个面向 JavaScript 工作者的自托管 WASM 沙箱，允许在不依赖外部运行时的情况下进行隔离执行，提升安全性与可移植性，适用于边缘负载和插件生态。反映出对可重复使用、保护隐私的运行时的需求增长。

items.title_en: Show HN: Boxes.dev: ditch localhost; run Claude Code and Codex in the cloud
items.title_zh: Boxes.dev：在云端运行 Claude Code 与 Codex
items.summary_en: Boxes.dev lets you run Claude Code and Codex in the cloud, ditching localhost runtimes and hardware constraints. It provides a managed environment for AI coding assistants, enabling rapid experimentation and collaboration without requiring local GPUs.
items.summary_zh: Boxes.dev 让 Claude Code 与 Codex 在云端运行，摆脱本地运行时和硬件限制。为开发者提供一个托管的 AI 编码助手环境，便于快速试验与协作，无需本地 GPU。

items.title_en: DIY Bipedal Robot Used Pneumatic "Air-Muscles" Instead of Motors
items.title_zh: DIY Bipedal Robot Used Pneumatic "Air-Muscles" Instead of Motors
items.summary_en: A DIY bipedal humanoid robot uses pneumatic air muscles instead of electric motors, trading precise torque for compliant, responsive motion. The project outlines hardware design and control challenges, offering a look at alternative actuation approaches in robotics. A fascinating take on soft robotics in practice.
items.summary_zh: 这款自制双足机器人采用气动“空气肌肉”替代电动机驱动，强调柔顺性和响应性。文中介绍了机械设计与控制难点，展示了机器人驱动的另外一种可行路径。

items.title_en: The architecture of the internet creates risks for democracy
items.title_zh: 互联网架构对民主带来风险
items.summary_en: The architecture of the internet creates risks for democracy by concentrating power among gatekeepers and enabling surveillance, manipulation, and censorship.
items.summary_zh: 互联网架构的集中化和平台化趋势可能放大监控、操控与审查对民主的影响。文章检讨平台设计、路由与数据治理如何塑造信息生态与公民参与。

items.title_en: Do the Hardest Thing
items.title_zh: 去做最难的事
items.summary_en: Justin Jackson argues that tackling the hardest, high-impact work early yields longer-term payoff, rather than chasing easier wins or vanity tasks. It advocates discipline to choose hard problems.
items.summary_zh: Justin Jackson 提出应优先解决最难但最具价值的任务，以换取长期回报，而非追逐易得成就。呼吁在工作中保持对难题的选择性与自律。

items.title_en: 1worldflag: A blue dot on a transparent background
items.title_zh: 1worldflag：透明背景上的蓝点旗帜
items.summary_en: 1worldflag provides a minimalist global flag asset—a blue dot on a transparent canvas—intended for simple, universal branding and web use. This kind of open, easily styled symbol reflects a trend toward lightweight, interoperable design assets.
items.summary_zh: 1worldflag 提供一个极简的全球旗帜图标——透明背景上的蓝点，适用于通用品牌和网页设计。这样的公开、易于使用的符号体现了对轻量级、互操作设计资源的偏好。

items.title_en: Mantine-datatable (and others) compromised – owner account suspended
items.title_zh: Mantine-datatable 及其他项目遭到入侵，维护者账户被暂停
items.summary_en: Mantine-datatable and other projects were compromised, with owner accounts suspended. The incident highlights security risks in OSS ecosystems and the downstream impact on users and maintainers.
items.summary_zh: Mantine-datatable 等项目遭到入侵，相关维护者账户被暂停。此事凸显了开源生态的安全风险及对用户和维护者的潜在影响。

items.title_en: Building iOS Apps with Doom Emacs
items.title_zh: 用 Doom Emacs 构建 iOS 应用
items.summary_en: A developer documents a workflow for building iOS apps using Doom Emacs, highlighting the Unix-friendly text editor as a viable IDE alternative. It covers integration with Xcode tooling, Swift development, and potential tradeoffs in debugging and project setup.
items.summary_zh: 作者分享了使用 Doom Emacs 构建 iOS 应用的工作流，展示这款轻量编辑器在移动开发中的可行性与潜力。文章探讨与 Xcode 流水线的整合、Swift 开发以及调试和项目配置的取舍。

items.title_en: Rethinking search as code generation
items.title_zh: 把搜索看作代码生成
items.summary_en: The piece argues for reframing search queries as code-generation tasks, enabling LLMs to emit structured queries, scripts, or APIs to fetch results. It discusses potential gains in accuracy and explainability, plus challenges around latency, privacy, and toolchain integration.
items.summary_zh: 文章主张把搜索请求转化为代码生成任务，让大模型输出结构化查询、脚本或接口来获取结果，同时讨论在可解释性、延迟、隐私与工具链整合等方面的潜在挑战。

items.title_en: FROST: Fingerprinting Remotely using OPFS-based SSD Timing [pdf]
items.title_zh: FROST：基于 OPFS 的 SSD 时序可进行远程指纹识别
items.summary_en: FROST presents a method to fingerprint devices remotely by analyzing SSD timing via the File System Access API (OPFS), revealing a novel web-side channel risk. Defenses include reducing timing leakage and restricting access to low-level IO.
items.summary_zh: FROST 提出通过 OPFS 的 SSD 时序实现对设备的远程指纹识别，揭示一种新的网页侧信道风险。防御包括降低时序泄露和限制对底层 IO 的访问。

items.title_en: Handmade Hawaiian Islands Map
items.title_zh: 手工绘制的夏威夷群岛地图
items.summary_en: Showcases a handmade cartographic map of the Hawaiian Islands, detailing the craft, data sources, and artistic choices.
items.summary_zh: 展示一张手工绘制的夏威夷群岛地图，介绍制作过程、数据来源与艺术选法。

items.title_en: Blorp Language
items.title_zh: Blorp 语言
items.summary_en: Blorp Language offers a fresh take on language design with a distinctive syntax and semantics. Early impressions say it's approachable and playful, inviting experimentation.
items.summary_zh: Blorp 语言在语法和语义上带来新颖的设计，颠覆传统语言范式。初步印象显示它亲和且富有趣味性，可能降低尝试新语言的门槛。

items.title_en: Algorithmic Monocultures in Hiring
items.title_zh: 招聘中的算法单一化问题
items.summary_en: A project argues that automated hiring pipelines can create algorithmic monocultures by over-filtering for narrow signals. It warns of bias amplification and reduced diversity, and advocates for transparent features, human-in-the-loop checks, and diverse training data. The takeaway is to design hiring tools that broaden rather than narrow candidate pools.
items.summary_zh: 该项目指出自动化招聘流程可能通过过度依赖狭窄信号而形成算法性单一化。它警示偏见放大和多样性下降，并主张采用透明特征、人工干预和多样化训练数据。核心要点是让招聘工具拓宽而非缩窄候选人池。

items.title_en: GoPro warned it may not survive
items.title_zh: GoPro 警告称可能难以存续
items.summary_en: GoPro issued a warning about its going-concern status, citing financial strain and strategic challenges; the company may need to pivot away from core products or invest in new bets like AI memory or services. The note underscores the volatility in hardware startups and the risk of extinction if cash burn persists.
items.summary_zh: GoPro 发布进入持续经营存疑的警告，称财务压力与战略挑战可能威胁其生存。若现金消耗居高不下，公司或需调整路线、寻求新业务方向，此事凸显硬件初创公司在不确定市场中的风险。

items.title_en: Reviving Teletext for Ham Radio
items.title_zh: 为业余无线电复兴 Teletext
items.summary_en: This revival blends retro tech with hobbyist experimentation, offering a low-bandwidth channel for timely information.
items.summary_zh: 文章介绍如何在业余无线电领域重新启用 Teletext 这一轻量级文本信息系统，利用现代硬件广播和检索页面。这场复兴把复古技术与发烧友实验相结合，为低带宽信息传递提供了新途径。

items.title_en: The Secret Life of Circuits with lcamtuf / Michał Zalewski (Audio Interview)
items.title_zh: lcamtuf / Michał Zalewski 的电路秘密生活（音频采访）
items.summary_en: An audio conversation with security pioneer Michał Zalewski exploring how low-level circuits and programming strategies shape vulnerability research and defense thinking. It offers practical anecdotes and mental models from a renowned engineer.
items.summary_zh: 与安全领域先驱 Michał Zalewski 的音频对话，探讨底层电路和编程策略如何影响漏洞研究与防御思维，提供这位知名工程师的实用轶事与思维模型。

items.title_en: Sum-product, unit distances, and number fields
items.title_zh: 和-积问题、单位距离与数域
items.summary_en: Explores connections between sum-product phenomena, unit-distance problems, and algebraic number fields in contemporary math. The discussion highlights how tools from number theory shape combinatorial geometry questions.
items.summary_zh: 探讨和-积现象、单位距离问题与代数数域之间的联系，以及数论工具在组合几何中的应用。讨论聚焦于这些方法如何推动对相关难题的理解。

items.title_en: Brume is a 24-voice multi-timbral desktop synth for the CM5
items.title_zh: Brume：为 CM5 提供的 24 声部桌面合成器
items.summary_en: Brume debuts as a 24-voice multi-timbral desktop synth built for the CM5, enabling layering of multiple patches with independent MIDI channels. The device targets studio and live players seeking compact, flexible hardware with desktop ergonomics.
items.summary_zh: Brume 推出一款面向 CM5 的桌面合成器，支持 24 声部多 timbral，让用户在同一机身上叠加多个声音并各自分配 MIDI 通道。体积紧凑、适合工作室和舞台使用，强调桌面化的便携与灵活性。

items.title_en: Show HN: Prela – Purely Algebraic Relation Combinators
items.title_zh: Prela：纯代数关系组合子
items.summary_en: Prela provides a purely algebraic framework for relation combinators, enabling declarative construction and manipulation of relations without procedural code. The approach could influence databases, program analysis, and symbolic computation by offering a solid mathematical foundation.
items.summary_zh: Prela 提供一个纯代数框架，用于关系的组合子，强调以声明式方式构造与操作关系，而非依赖过程性代码。这一思路有望为数据库、程序分析与符号计算提供坚实的数学基础。

items.title_en: Inside FAISS: Billion-Scale Similarity Search
items.title_zh: FAISS内幕：亿级相似性搜索
items.summary_en: A look inside FAISS, the billion-scale similarity search library, covering indexing strategies, GPU acceleration, and practical considerations for building scalable vector search systems.
items.summary_zh: 揭示 FAISS 在亿级规模下实现高效相似性搜索的原理，包括索引策略、GPU 加速等要点，并讨论构建可扩展向量检索系统的实际要点。

items.title_en: Ten Years of Franz
items.title_zh: Franz 十周年纪念
items.summary_en: Franz spent a decade building a single desktop client that aggregates multiple messaging services. The post reflects on product pivots, community feedback, and lessons learned while outlining the roadmap for the evolving multi-IM ecosystem. It offers takeaways for developers building integrated tools and for users who depend on centralized chat workflows.
items.summary_zh: Franz 作为一个聚合多种对话服务的桌面客户端，走过十年历程，文中回顾了产品演进、社区反馈与关键教训，并展望未来路线。对构建集成型应用的开发者和依赖统一工作流的用户来说，这一里程碑既有技术启示，也揭示了在隐私、稳定性与生态兼容性方面的挑战。

items.title_en: Show HN: Paseo – Beautiful open-source coding agent interface
items.title_zh: Show HN：Paseo——美观的开源编码代理界面
items.summary_en: Paseo provides a beautiful open-source coding agent interface, showcasing polished tooling for AI-assisted coding. It highlights the trend toward user-friendly interfaces that blend AI copilots with programming tasks.
items.summary_zh: Show HN：Paseo——美观的开源编码代理界面，展示了面向编程助手的现代化工具界面。

items.title_en: Splash Is a Colour Format
items.title_zh: Splash 是一种颜色格式
items.summary_en: Splash is a new color format that promises to optimize color representation for faster rendering and more efficient compression. If adopted by graphics pipelines and hardware, it could streamline image processing and real-time rendering.
items.summary_zh: Splash 是一种新颜色格式，致力于优化颜色表示、提升渲染效率或压缩性能。若被图形管线和硬件广泛采纳，可能影响图片处理与实时渲染的实现。

items.title_en: JLink JTAG Access on the Pinecil
items.title_zh: 在 Pinecil 上实现 JLink JTAG 访问
items.summary_en: Describes enabling J-Link JTAG access on the Pinecil hardware, unlocking advanced debugging and programming capabilities for this portable soldering device.
items.summary_zh: 介绍在 Pinecil 硬件上实现 J-Link/JTAG 访问，解锁面向这款便携焊接设备的高级调试与编程能力。

items.title_en: Summer of '85: DOSBOS is rejected by ANALOG Computing
items.title_zh: 1985 年夏季：DOSBOS 被 ANALOG Computing 拒绝
items.summary_en: A retro-tech vignette about a DOS-based project called DOSBOS being rejected by ANALOG Computing in the Summer of 1985, highlighting the era's gatekeeping and editorial preferences.
items.summary_zh: 回顾性文章讲述 DOSBOS 项目在 1985 年夏天被 ANALOG Computing 拒绝的事件，反映了早期计算机出版物的门槛与编辑偏好。

items.title_en: Castor: CERN Advanced STORage Manager
items.title_zh: Castor：CERN 高级存储管理器
items.summary_en: Castor is CERN's large-scale storage management system designed to handle vast data from physics experiments. It coordinates data placement across diverse backends, balancing performance and reliability for petabyte-scale archives.
items.summary_zh: Castor 是 CERN 的大规模存储管理系统，用于在粒子物理实验中高效管理海量数据。它把数据放置在多种存储后端之间，兼顾性能与可靠性，服务对象覆盖科研团队。

items.title_en: Show HN: Oproxy – inspect and modify network traffic from the browser
items.title_zh: Show HN：Oproxy——在浏览器中检查和修改网络流量
items.summary_en: Oproxy is a browser-based tool for inspecting and modifying network traffic, useful for debugging, security testing, and understanding single-page app behavior.
items.summary_zh: Oproxy 是一个基于浏览器的网络流量检查与修改工具，便于调试、安全测试以及理解单页应用的网络行为。

items.title_en: NSA using Anthropic's Mythos for cyber attacks
items.title_zh: NSA 将 Anthropic 的 Mythos 用于网络攻击
items.summary_en: NSA is reported to be using Anthropic's Mythos for cyber operations, illustrating the dual-use nature of advanced AI models in state security work. The report underscores considerations around governance, access, and risk.
items.summary_zh: 据称国家安全局将 Anthropic 的 Mythos 用于网络攻击，凸显先进 AI 模型的双重用途及对治理、访问控制的挑战。

items.title_en: Show HN: Mercek – A Desktop IDE for AWS ECS
items.title_zh: Show HN：Mercek — 面向 AWS ECS 的桌面 IDE
items.summary_en: Mercek is a desktop IDE tailored for AWS ECS, enabling developers to manage clusters, services, and deployments from a local app. It showcases a growing trend of native tooling for cloud-native workflows.
items.summary_zh: Mercek 是一款面向 AWS ECS 的桌面集成开发环境，便于在本地管理集群、服务和部署。体现云原生工作流中对本地化工具需求的增加。

items.title_en: Fluid Simulation for Dummies (2006)
items.title_zh: 面向初学者的流体仿真
items.summary_en: A beginner-friendly primer on fluid simulation introduces core concepts and approachable examples, demystifying Navier-Stokes-inspired methods for hobbyists and students. It helps readers understand the practical trade-offs and common pitfalls in simulating fluids in code.
items.summary_zh: 这篇面向初学者的流体仿真入门教程，揭示了核心概念并用友好示例讲解。帮助读者理解在代码中实现流体仿真时的实际权衡与常见陷阱。

items.title_en: Anyone seen a CC- serial prefix on legacy networking hardware?
items.title_zh: 在旧式网络硬件上看到 CC- 前缀的序列号吗？
items.summary_en: A discussion about legacy networking hardware serial prefixes, specifically CC-, touching on hardware provenance and supply chain security.
items.summary_zh: 关于旧式网络硬件的序列号前缀 CC- 的讨论，涉及硬件来源和供应链安全。

items.title_en: You'll never guess who made the first wireless telephone
items.title_zh: 你永远猜不到是谁发明了第一部无线电话
items.summary_en: A historical look at the surprising inventor behind the first wireless telephone, challenging popular myths with new archival detail. The piece traces early radio experiments and the messy, collaborative nature of telecom breakthroughs that predate wired phones. It reframes how we think about the origins of wireless communication.
items.summary_zh: 这篇文章揭示了第一台无线电话的真实发明者，颠覆常见误解并给出历史背景。文中回顾早期无线电实验及通信技术的演进过程，强调发明往往是多人协作的结果，早于有线电话的实现。

items.title_en: Launch HN: General Instinct (YC P26) – Frontier models on edge devices
items.title_zh: Launch HN：General Instinct（YC P26）— 边缘设备上的前沿模型
items.summary_en: Launch HN spotlight on General Instinct, a frontier model designed to run on edge devices. It demonstrates progress toward on-device AI with efficiency focused on latency, memory, and offline capabilities.
items.summary_zh: 在 Launch HN 中介绍 General Instinct，这是一个面向边缘设备的前沿模型。该项目展示了在边缘端实现高效、低延迟、离线可用的 AI 能力的最新进展。

items.title_en: Delacroix's Entry of the Crusaders into Constantinople Restored
items.title_zh: 德拉克洛瓦《十字军进入君士坦丁堡》修复再现原貌
items.summary_en: Delacroix’s painting has been restored to its original glory, revealing refreshed colors and brushwork that had faded. The restoration effort highlights how conservation can deepen public appreciation and bring historical artworks to new audiences.
items.summary_zh: 德拉克洛瓦的《十字军进入君士坦丁堡》完成修复，重新展现出原本的色彩与笔触。此次修复加强了人们对历史作品的理解与欣赏，并使其得以接触到新的观众。

items.title_en: Azure Linux Desktop
items.title_zh: Azure Linux 桌面：WSLc、WinUI、Reactor 与 Azure Linux 4.0 的融合
items.summary_en: Azure Linux Desktop weaves together Windows-centric tooling (WSLc, WinUI) with Linux desktop capabilities under Azure Linux 4.0 to deliver a cloud-based, GUI-driven Linux experience. The mashup signals how cloud providers are blurring lines between OS ecosystems and easing desktop workflows in the cloud.
items.summary_zh: Azure Linux 桌面将 Windows 生态工具（WSLc、WinUI）与 Linux 桌面能力在 Azure Linux 4.0 下融合，提供云端的图形界面化 Linux 体验。这种混合趋势显示云服务商正在模糊操作系统生态的边界，并简化云端桌面工作流。

items.title_en: Linear Cosine Palettes(2025)
items.title_zh: 线性余弦调色板（2025）
items.summary_en: Explores linear cosine palettes, a color-mreh approach for generating smooth, perceptually uniform color maps, with updates for 2025. Practical guidance helps designers craft visually consistent gradients and themes.
items.summary_zh: 介绍线性余弦调色板，一种用于生成平滑且感知一致的颜色映射的颜色数学方法，并提供面向 2025 的更新。为设计师提供实用建议，帮助创建颜色渐变与主题的一致性。

items.title_en: Asserts in Zig
items.title_zh: Zig 中的断言
items.summary_en: A discussion on fixing and strengthening asserts in Zig, offering practical patterns to avoid common pitfalls and improve reliability.
items.summary_zh: 讨论如何修正和加强 Zig 语言中的断言，提供避免常见错误的实用模式以提升可靠性。

items.title_en: Show HN: Live breath detection and biofeedback from a phone microphone
items.title_zh: Show HN：用手机麦克风进行实时呼吸检测与生物反馈
items.summary_en: Live breath detection and biofeedback from a phone mic demonstrate a lightweight, real-time wellness tool that guides breathing exercises and physiological awareness. The project shows how accessible audio processing and ML can be made mobile-friendly.
items.summary_zh: 一个运行在手机麦克风上的实时呼吸检测与生物反馈系统，展示了在移动设备上实现低成本健康监测和呼吸训练的可行性。该项目体现了利用移动端音频处理和机器学习的可访问性。

items.title_en: DNS is for people, not for IT infrastructure
items.title_zh: DNS 为人使用，而不仅仅是 IT 基础设施
items.summary_en: Argues that DNS should prioritize human usability and resilience, not only as an IT backbone. The piece advocates approachable naming schemes and user-centric DNS design.
items.summary_zh: 主张 DNS 的设计应以人类使用体验和鲁棒性为优先，而不仅仅作为 IT 基础设施。文中倡导更友好的命名方式与以用户为中心的 DNS 设计。

items.title_en: Reverse-Engineered Userspace Driver for Asus ZenVision Lid OLED on Linux"
items.title_zh: 在 Linux 上对 Asus ZenVision Lid OLED 的 Linux 用户态驱动进行逆向工程
items.summary_en: Researchers released a reverse-engineered Linux userspace driver enabling the ZenVision lid OLED to work under Linux. The project underscores the value of open-source approaches for niche hardware and the friction created by closed vendor stacks.
items.summary_zh: 研究者公布了用于 Asus ZenVision Lid OLED 的 Linux 用户态驱动的逆向工程成果，使该显示在 Linux 上可用。项目凸显了开源社区在小众硬件上的价值，同时也暴露了厂商封闭生态的挑战。

items.title_en: No Let, No Rec, No Problem: A Gentler Introduction to the Y and Z Combinators
items.title_zh: 不需要 let、也不用递归：更友好的 Y 与 Z 组合子入门
items.summary_en: Y and Z fixed-point combinators let you express recursion without named functions. A gentler introduction walks through intuition and practical examples, showing how to implement recursive behavior in languages without native recursion or let-bindings. The takeaway is a clearer mental model of fixed-point theory and how to simulate self-reference in simple terms.
items.summary_zh: Y 与 Z 固定点组合子让你在没有显式递归的情况下实现自引用。本文用更易懂的讲解和示例，演示在没有 let 绑定或显式递归的语言中如何实现递归行为，帮助读者建立对固定点原理的直观理解。

items.title_en: Announcing Zstandard in Rust
items.title_zh: Rust 中的 Zstandard 实现发布
items.summary_en: A Rust implementation of the Zstandard compression algorithm is announced, offering high performance with Rust's safety guarantees. The project could provide a drop-in replacement for C libraries with safer abstractions and stronger ecosystem integration. It may attract adoption in Rust projects needing fast compression.
items.summary_zh: 在 Rust 中实现 Zstandard 压缩算法的公告，结合高性能与 Rust 的内存安全特性。该实现有望为需要快速压缩的 Rust 项目提供更安全、易于集成的替代方案。

items.title_en: CP/M-86 & MS-DOS Cross Development Environment
items.title_zh: CP/M-86 与 MS-DOS 的跨平台开发环境
items.summary_en: A project provides a cross-development environment to build CP/M-86 and MS-DOS software on modern hosts, leveraging emulation and toolchains. It makes vintage x86 development more approachable for hobbyists and educators.
items.summary_zh: 一个项目提供了在现代主机上构建 CP/M-86 和 MS-DOS 软件的跨开发环境，利用仿真工具链，使复古的 x86 开发对爱好者和教育者更易接近。

items.title_en: Show HN: Free animated icon library for Vue
items.title_zh: Show HN: 免费的 Vue 动画图标库
items.summary_en: A free, open-source animated icon library for Vue, with motion-capable SVG icons ready to drop into projects. It demonstrates how community-maintained UI assets can accelerate frontend development and reduce design overhead.
items.summary_zh: 这是一个面向 Vue 的免费开源动画图标库，提供支持动画的 SVG 图标并可方便地嵌入项目。社区驱动的资源库展示了前端开发者在 UI 动效方面的低成本、可访问性和可扩展性。

items.title_en: Show HN: FFmpeg WebCLI – Full FFmpeg in Browser, Offline PWA, No Uploads(WASM)
items.title_zh: Show HN：FFmpeg WebCLI — 浏览器中完整 FFmpeg、离线 PWA、无需上传（WASM）
items.summary_en: FFmpeg WebCLI brings the full FFmpeg toolset to the browser as a WASM-based offline PWA with no uploads required. This enables client-side video processing without sending data to the cloud, though it comes with performance tradeoffs.
items.summary_zh: FFmpeg WebCLI 将完整版 FFmpeg 带入浏览器，以 WASM 构建的离线 PWA 形式运行且无需上传视频。方便在本地完成视频转码，保护隐私，但对设备性能有一定制约。

items.title_en: Several injured in Boeing 787 nose-gear collapse in Frankfurt
items.title_zh: 法兰克福波音 787 前轮起落架坍塌，多人受伤
items.summary_en: Reports a nose-gear collapse on a Boeing 787 at Frankfurt, injuring several, with investigations likely ongoing.
items.summary_zh: 法兰克福一架波音 787 的前轮起落架坍塌，造成多人受伤，相关调查正在进行中。

items.title_en: Introduction – Rust for Python Programmers
items.title_zh: 简介——面向 Python 程序员的 Rust 入门
items.summary_en: An approachable bridge guide for Python developers to learn Rust, covering fundamentals, tooling like Cargo, and practical patterns to boost performance and safety. It helps readers translate Python workflows into Rust-friendly designs and leverage Rust's ecosystem.
items.summary_zh: 本教程为 Python 程序员提供友好的 Rust 入门，涵盖基础、工具链（如 Cargo）与提升性能和安全性的实用模式，帮助读者将 Python 工作流迁移到 Rust 风格的设计并利用 Rust 生态。

items.title_en: Wow, if it's this easy in 1998, I bet it'll be even easier in 2026
items.title_zh: 如果1998年这么容易，2026年会更容易吧
items.summary_en: Nostalgic post argues that tasks were easier in 1998; the author predicts even easier workflows by 2026 as tooling and AI mature, reflecting on progress yet to come.
items.summary_zh: 这篇怀旧帖认为1998年某些任务更易完成，作者预期到2026年工具链与 AI 更成熟将使之更容易，并反映技术进步带来的前瞻性展望。

items.title_en: When su replaced login for becoming another Unix login
items.title_zh: su 替代登录成为另一个 Unix 用户的探讨
items.summary_en: The post explains how the su command can substitute the current session for another user, effectively bypassing a full login, and contrasts this with authentic login behavior. It discusses security implications, auditing, and why sudo is often preferred for traceable privilege elevation.
items.summary_zh: 文章解释了如何通过 su 命令将当前会话替换为另一个用户的身份，从而在某种程度上绕过完整登录，并对比了与真正登录的行为差异。讨论了安全性、审计以及在日常运维中为何更应偏好 sudo 以实现可追踪的特权提升。

items.title_en: Show HN: Soft Body Jiggle Physics
items.title_zh: Show HN：软体物理抖动效果
items.summary_en: This project offers a compact implementation of soft-body jiggle physics suitable for games and simulations, emphasizing approachable code, real-time performance, and extensibility. It’s a useful reference for hobbyists and developers exploring physics-based animation without heavy engines.
items.summary_zh: 该项目提供了一个简洁的软体物理抖动实现，适用于游戏与仿真，强调可读性、实时性能与扩展性。对于爱好者和开发者探索无重型引擎的物理动画非常有参考价值。

items.title_en: Movwin: My (Unpublished) TUI Framework
items.title_zh: Movwin：我的（未出版）TUI 框架
items.summary_en: A candid look at Movwin, a TUI framework the author built, including design choices for terminal interfaces and potential roadmap.
items.summary_zh: 介绍 Movwin 这一未公开的文本用户界面框架，讨论了终端界面设计要点与未来计划。

items.title_en: Finding success in industry as a chip designer
items.title_zh: 在芯片设计行业取得成功
items.summary_en: The piece contrasts academic paths vs industry for chip designers, emphasizing practical engineering experience, fab collaboration, and end-to-end system thinking. It offers career strategies for researchers aiming to transition into impactful hardware roles.
items.summary_zh: 文章对比了学术路径与业界在芯片设计中的发展，强调实践工程经验、与晶圆厂的协作以及端到端的系统思维的重要性。为希望进入有影响力的硬件岗位的研究人员提供了职业策略。

items.title_en: Tech sell-off widens as South Korea index plunges
items.title_zh: 科技股抛售扩大，韩国股指大幅下挫
items.summary_en: Tech sell-off widens as South Korea index plunges, reflecting investor concerns about demand, high valuations, and geopolitical volatility; the move may ripple through global semiconductor and hardware firms.
items.summary_zh: 科技股抛售扩大，随着韩国股指大幅下挫，暴露出对需求、估值和地缘政治波动的担忧，可能波及全球半导体与硬件公司。

items.title_en: Warren's Abstract Machine: A Tutorial Reconstruction
items.title_zh: 沃伦的抽象机：教程重构
items.summary_en: A tutorial-style reconstruction of Warren's Abstract Machine (WAM), illustrating how Prolog-style execution can be modeled and implemented. It bridges theory and practical interpreter design for language enthusiasts.
items.summary_zh: 通过教程式的重构，讲解沃伦的抽象机（WAM）及其对 Prolog 风格执行的建模与实现，帮助读者将理论与实际解释器设计连接起来。

items.title_en: WoofWare.PawPrint, a Deterministic .NET Runtime
items.title_zh: WoofWare.PawPrint：一个确定性的 .NET 运行时
items.summary_en: WoofWare.PawPrint is a deterministic .NET runtime aimed at reproducible results and safer concurrent execution. It appeals to developers needing predictable builds for testing, formal verification, or embedded contexts.
items.summary_zh: WoofWare.PawPrint 是一个确定性的 .NET 运行时，旨在实现可重复的执行结果，降低时序与并发带来的不确定性。对需要可预测构建、形式化验证或嵌入式场景的开发者具有吸引力。

items.title_en: What's gonna happen to software engineers?
items.title_zh: 软件工程师将何去何从？
items.summary_en: Speculates on the future of software engineers in an era of AI and automation, focusing on likely skill shifts and job dynamics.
items.summary_zh: 探讨在 AI 与自动化时代，软件工程师的未来走向，聚焦技能结构的变化和就业格局。

items.title_en: My 15-year-old relative was killed for refusing to marry her cousin
items.title_zh: 因拒绝表亲婚嫁而被杀：一名15岁亲属的遭遇
items.summary_en: A 15-year-old relative was killed for refusing forced marriage to a cousin, highlighting ongoing gender-based violence and failures in child protection. The tragedy underscores human-rights concerns and the need for stronger safeguards for vulnerable girls in affected regions. The case has drawn international attention to local and cultural dynamics surrounding forced marriage.
items.summary_zh: 一名15岁亲属因拒绝被迫与表亲结婚而遇害，突显持续的性别暴力与未成年人保护体系的缺失。这一悲剧凸显人权问题和对受影响地区弱势女孩更强保护的需求，引发国际社会对当地文化与强迫婚姻问题的关注。

items.title_en: Radxa Dragon Q8B: A Laptop Cosplaying as an SBC?
items.title_zh: Radxa Dragon Q8B：一台像笔记本的单板计算机？
items.summary_en: Reviews Radxa Dragon Q8B as a powerful SBC with an unusually laptop-like form factor, weighing portability, thermals, and expandability; raises questions about what constitutes a laptop versus an SBC.
items.summary_zh: 评测 Radxa Dragon Q8B，作为功能强大的单板计算机，具备类似笔记本电脑的外形，讨论便携性、散热和扩展性，以及笔记本与 SBC 的边界。

items.title_en: Is Python Becoming Pinyin?
items.title_zh: Python 正在变成拼音吗？
items.summary_en: Python's syntax and readability trends are increasingly oriented toward approachability and simplicity, inviting comparisons to Pinyin as a phonetic shorthand for code.
items.summary_zh: Python 的语法和可读性趋势正向更易上手和简约发展，甚至被比喻为代码的拼音。该文探讨这一变化对学习曲线、开发效率和工具生态的影响。

items.title_en: “The Apple Boogie“ 1987 Mac Promo Album Cassette Tape [video]
items.title_zh: 《The Apple Boogie》：1987 年 Mac 宣传专辑磁带视频
items.summary_en: A vintage promo clip from 1987 showcases Apple's marketing style and the Mac era's branding through a promotional album cassette. The video offers a rare glimpse into how Apple marketed the early Mac and the era's tech culture. It serves as a cultural time capsule of Apple's branding language from the era.
items.summary_zh: 一段珍贵的1987年苹果Mac宣传磁带视频，展示了当时的营销风格与Mac时代的品牌形象。该视频提供了关于早期Mac的市场推广方式及当时科技文化语境的罕见视角，堪作品牌史的时间胶囊。

items.title_en: Crystal Nights (2008)
items.title_zh: Crystal Nights（2008）
items.summary_en: Crystal Nights is a 2008 science fiction work by Greg Egan.
items.summary_zh: Crystal Nights 是 Greg Egan 于 2008 年创作的科幻作品。

items.title_en: Rift: Better Alternative to Git Worktrees
items.title_zh: Rift：比 Git Worktrees 更好的替代方案
items.summary_en: Rift presents a more efficient or flexible approach to managing multiple working trees compared to git worktrees. It discusses design goals and scenarios where Rift shines, such as dependency-heavy projects.
items.summary_zh: Rift 提出一种比 Git worktrees 更简洁、隔离性更好、性能更优的替代方案。文章讨论了在依赖密集型项目中的应用场景及如何降低使用摩擦。

items.title_en: Dumbphone 2
items.title_zh: Dumbphone 2：极简手机二代
items.summary_en: The next iteration of the Dumbphone continues the minimalist philosophy, prioritizing reliable calls, privacy, and long battery life while avoiding smartphone distractions.
items.summary_zh: Dumbphone 2 继续推进极简设计，强调稳定通话、隐私保护和长续航，避免智能手机带来的干扰。

items.title_en: Efficient and Training-Free Single-Image Diffusion Models
items.title_zh: 高效且无需训练的单图扩散模型
items.summary_en: A method for obtaining efficient, training-free diffusion outputs from a single image, pushing diffusion models toward zero-shot or few-shot adaptation. This reduces compute and data requirements while maintaining quality.
items.summary_zh: 提出一种通过单图实现高效、无需额外训练的扩散模型输出的方法，推进零-shot/少样本自适应，降低计算与数据需求，同时保持输出质量。

items.title_en: Trees to Flows and Back: Unifying Decision Trees and Diffusion Models
items.title_zh: 从树到流再回到树：统一决策树与扩散模型
items.summary_en: A theoretical piece proposing a unification between decision trees and diffusion models, bringing together interpretable, discrete models with powerful continuous generators. The approach could advance AI interpretability and hybrid architectures.
items.summary_zh: 该研究尝试把可解释的离散模型与强大连续生成模型结合起来，提出统一决策树与扩散模型的方法，或提升可解释性并为混合架构提供新思路。

items.title_en: Watching a Z80 from an RP2350
items.title_zh: 用 RP2350 观察 Z80 的运行
items.summary_en: Demonstrates observing a Z80 CPU trace from a RP2350 platform, offering a retro-computing perspective on emulation, instrumentation, and real-time debugging. It provides practical insights into cross-platform experimentation.
items.summary_zh: 展示在 RP2350 平台上观测 Z80 CPU 的运行轨迹，提供对仿真、仪器化与实时调试的复古视角。为跨平台实验提供了实用的见解。

items.title_en: Rootshell: A new E2EE email service hosted in Iceland
items.title_zh: Rootshell：在冰岛托管的端对端加密邮件服务
items.summary_en: Rootshell launches a new E2EE email service hosted in Iceland, emphasizing privacy, jurisdiction, and data protection. It likely uses end-to-end encryption by default, with considerations about metadata, accessibility, and self-contained servers.
items.summary_zh: Rootshell 推出在冰岛托管的端对端加密邮件服务，突显隐私保护与地理管辖的优势。默认采用端对端加密，需关注元数据暴露与服务器自托管等细节。

items.title_en: Show HN: Mnemo – local-first AI memory layer for any LLM (Rust, SQLite,petgraph)
items.title_zh: Mnemo：本地优先的 AI 记忆层，面向任意大型语言模型（Rust、SQLite、petgraph）
items.summary_en: Mnemo provides a local-first memory layer for LLMs, enabling on-device or local-then-sync memory storage using Rust, SQLite, and petgraph. This approach improves privacy and latency and can reduce reliance on external vector databases. It could become a building block for offline-capable AI apps.
items.summary_zh: Mnemo 为 LLM 提供本地优先的记忆层，利用 Rust、SQLite 和 petgraph 实现本地存储并可与云端同步。提高隐私与低延迟，降低对外部向量数据库的依赖，有望成为离线 AI 应用的基础组件。

items.title_en: A visual introduction to kernel functions
items.title_zh: 核函数的可视化入门
items.summary_en: The visual introduction to kernel functions explains how kernels map data into higher-dimensional spaces to enable nonlinear patterns. The piece ties theory to practical ML tools like SVMs and Gaussian processes, boosting intuition.
items.summary_zh: 这篇可视化入门通过直观图形展示核函数如何将数据映射到更高维空间以实现非线性模式，并连接到支持向量机与高斯过程等实际应用，帮助读者建立直觉。

items.title_en: Florida AG files lawsuit against OpenAI, CEO Sam Altman for deceptive practices
items.title_zh: 佛州检察长对 OpenAI 与高管提起欺诈诉讼
items.summary_en: Florida's AG files a lawsuit against OpenAI and Sam Altman alleging deceptive AI practices, signaling regulatory scrutiny of AI vendors.
items.summary_zh: 佛州检察长对 OpenAI 及首席执行官提起欺诈诉讼，指控其存在欺骗性 AI 实践，凸显监管对 AI 供应商的审查。

items.title_en: Why isn't the U.S. better at soccer?
items.title_zh: 美国为何在足球方面表现不如人意？
items.summary_en: Silver analyzes structural factors behind the US soccer performance, including talent development pipelines, league competitiveness, and grassroots investment, arguing that systemic reforms are needed for long-term improvement. The piece emphasizes data-driven, policy-backed approaches to grow the sport.
items.summary_zh: 尼特·西尔弗分析了美国足球表现不佳的结构性原因，如青训体系、联赛竞争力和草根投入等，并提出需要通过长期、系统性的改革来提升水平，强调以数据驱动和政策支持来推进运动发展。

items.title_en: The OnlyFans Economy of American AI
items.title_zh: 美国 AI 的 OnlyFans 经济
items.summary_en: A look at how the AI industry in the US is sustained by a creator-economy style labor model, where data labeling, model training, and content contributions are commodified. The piece argues that this 'OnlyFans' style economy shapes who benefits, pressures workers, and influences AI pricing and governance; implications for regulation and equity in AI development.
items.summary_zh: 聚焦美国 AI 行业如何通过创作者经济式劳动模式维持运作：数据标注、模型训练与内容贡献被商品化。文章认为这种“OnlyFans 风格”的经济模式决定了谁受益、对工人施加压力，并影响 AI 定价与治理，对监管和公平性具有重要影响。

items.title_en: Nordstjernen 1.0
items.title_zh: Nordstjernen 1.0 发布
items.summary_en: Nordstjernen 1.0 announces a release with new features and design goals; the post likely highlights improvements, bug fixes, or compatibility updates from the 0.x to 1.0 milestone. It marks a major step for the project.
items.summary_zh: Nordstjernen 1.0 发布，宣布带来新的功能与设计目标，通常会聚焦从早期版本到 1.0 的改进、修复与兼容性提升，标志该项目迈入新阶段。

items.title_en: Microsoft announces Scout, an autonomous AI agent built on OpenClaw
items.title_zh: 微软公布 Scout：基于 OpenClaw 的自治 AI 代理
items.summary_en: Microsoft announces Scout, an autonomous AI agent built on OpenClaw. Scout is designed to autonomously select tools, make decisions, and execute actions, enabling more capable automation across software and robotics contexts.
items.summary_zh: 微软宣布 Scout，这是一个基于 OpenClaw 的自治 AI 代理，能够自主选择工具、做出决策并执行操作，推动软件与机器人领域的自动化能力提升。

items.title_en: Sony Launches Bravia 9 II and Bravia 7 II with 'True RGB'
items.title_zh: 索尼推出 Bravia 9 II 与 Bravia 7 II，搭载 True RGB
items.summary_en: Sony's Bravia 9 II and 7 II premiere True RGB processing, signaling a new standard for color fidelity. The feature could matter for media creators, gamers, and color-critical viewing.
items.summary_zh: 索尼推出 Bravia 9 II 与 Bravia 7 II，引入 True RGB 图像处理，提升色彩真实度。这项功能对媒体创作者、游戏玩家和需要准确色彩的观影体验尤为重要。

items.title_en: The curious case of low-protein diets
items.title_zh: 低蛋白饮食的奥秘：动物为何更长寿
items.summary_en: The curious case of low-protein diets discusses findings that reduced protein intake can extend lifespan in some animals, likely via nutrient-sensing pathways. It weighs trade-offs in reproduction and health and considers what this could mean for aging research in humans. The piece situates the results in a broader ecological and evolutionary context.
items.summary_zh: Knowable Magazine 深度报道显示，在某些动物模型中，降低蛋白质摄入可能延长寿命，常与代谢通路如 mTOR、胰岛素/生长因子有关。文章探讨了繁殖、健康与生态环境的权衡，以及这些发现对人类衰老研究的潜在启示。

items.title_en: Show HN: RePlaya – self-hosted browser session replay with live tailing
items.title_zh: Show HN: RePlaya – 自托管的浏览器会话回放与实时尾随
items.summary_en: RePlaya is a self-hosted browser session replay tool with live tailing, enabling private debugging of user sessions without third-party services. It appeals to teams prioritizing data sovereignty and reproducibility.
items.summary_zh: RePlaya 是一个自托管的浏览器会话回放工具，具备实时尾随功能，支持在不依赖第三方服务的前提下进行私密调试，适合重视数据主权与可重复性的团队。

items.title_en: The LLM warnings Google fired Timnit Gebru over have all come true
items.title_zh: Timnit Gebru 的 LLM 警告如今全部应验
items.summary_en: The piece argues that warnings about LLM risks—raised surrounding Timnit Gebru's departure—have largely come true, including concerns about bias, safety, governance, and societal impact. It underlines the need for responsible AI practices and greater transparency as models scale.
items.summary_zh: 本文认为围绕大语言模型风险的警告在 Timnit Gebru 事件后逐步成为现实，涉及偏见、安全、治理与社会影响等方面。强调在模型规模扩大背景下，需要更负责任的 AI 实践与更高透明度。

items.title_en: AI, Ashby Engineering, and the future
items.title_zh: AI、阿什比工程学与未来
items.summary_en: Discusses how AI intersects with Ashby’s cybernetics and engineering principles, exploring how systems thinking informs the design of future intelligent technologies.
items.summary_zh: 讨论 AI 与阿什比工程学原理之间的关系，探讨控制论思维如何影响未来智能系统的设计。

items.title_en: Tribute to Jiro Yamada, Automotive Artist (1960-2025) [video]
items.title_zh: 致敬汽车艺术家 山田次郎（1960-2025）[视频]
items.summary_en: A video tribute honors Jiro Yamada, whose automotive artwork blended design vision with mechanical craft. The piece showcases his most influential works and the impact on concept cars, automotive branding, and design education.
items.summary_zh: 通过视频致敬山田次郎，他在汽车艺术领域将设计愿景与机械工艺相融合。作品集展现了他最具影响力的作品及其对概念车、品牌与设计教育的影响。

items.title_en: Valve says it's ready to launch the Steam Machine this summer
items.title_zh: Valve 表示今年夏天将推出 Steam Machine
items.summary_en: Valve claims it is ready to launch the Steam Machine hardware this summer, aiming to bring PC-like gaming into the living room with SteamOS integration.
items.summary_zh: Valve 表示今年夏天将推出 Steam Machine 硬件，旨在将类似 PC 的游戏体验带入客厅并与 SteamOS 深度整合。

items.title_en: sqlite: A CGo-free port of SQLite/SQLite3
items.title_zh: sqlite：无 CGo 的 SQLite/SQLite3 端口
items.summary_en: sqlite: A CGO-free port of SQLite/SQLite3 describes a CGO-free embedding of SQLite, reducing binary dependencies and making it easier to build in environments without CGo. There may be trade-offs in performance or compatibility, but it simplifies cross-language use.
items.summary_zh: 该项目提供了一个无 CGo 的 SQLite/SQLite3 端口，便于在不依赖 cgo 的环境中嵌入数据库。它降低了二进制依赖与跨编译难度，但可能在性能或兼容性上有权衡。

items.title_en: Unicode Fonts and Tools for X11
items.title_zh: 用于 X11 的 Unicode 字体与工具
items.summary_en: Unicode fonts and tools for X11 are available, addressing font rendering and glyph support for diverse languages on Unix-like systems.
items.summary_zh: 该资源提供了用于 X11 的 Unicode 字体与相关工具，改善多语言环境下的字形显示与渲染。

items.title_en: Leak Reveals Microsoft Wants Its AI to Be 'Addictive'
items.title_zh: 泄露称微软欲使其 AI 具备‘上瘾性’
items.summary_en: A leaked report suggests Microsoft aims to make its AI products highly addictive, raising concerns about user wellbeing, monetization, and responsibility. The document highlights tensions between engagement-driven design and ethical AI.
items.summary_zh: 泄露文件称微软希望其 AI 产品具备高度吸引力，引发对用户福祉、商业化与负责任 AI 的担忧；文本揭示了以增长黏性为导向的设计与伦理之间的张力。

items.title_en: Tesla retroactively added 'supervised' to FSD contracts owners signed years ago
items.title_zh: 特斯拉回溯性地在 FSD 合同中加入‘受监督’
items.summary_en: Tesla retroactively added 'supervised' to FSD contracts, altering the user agreement to require supervision for autonomy. The move raises questions about consumer rights, software liability, and the evolving definition of driver assistance.
items.summary_zh: 特斯拉回溯性地在 FSD 合同中加入“受监督”条款，要求在自动驾驶情况下需要监督。此举引发关于消费者权利、软件责任和驾驶辅助定义演变的讨论。

items.title_en: Loading Sega Games Off a Vinyl Record [video]
items.title_zh: 通过黑胶唱片加载世嘉游戏的演示视频
items.summary_en: A video demonstrates loading Sega games from a vinyl record data encoding, blending analog media with digital games. The stunt illustrates creative data encoding and the longevity of physical media for experimentation.
items.summary_zh: 视频展示了通过黑胶唱片中的数据编码加载世嘉游戏的实验，将模拟介质与数字游戏数据进行有趣的融合。

items.title_en: Now AI agents need what RSS does
items.title_zh: AI 代理现在需要像 RSS 那样的输入流
items.summary_en: AI agents rely on feed-like data streams to stay current; RSS-like inputs offer structured, low-latency content with metadata that agents can parse and reason over. The piece argues that traditional web feeds may become essential plumbing for autonomous systems and copilots.
items.summary_zh: 文章主张 AI 代理需要像 RSS 那样的输入流来获取结构化、可预测的内容，便于解析和推理。此类 feed 式的数据源可能成为自动化系统和协作助手的关键底层。

items.title_en: Magenta RealTime 2: Open and Local Live Music Models
items.title_zh: Magenta RealTime 2：开源本地实时音乐模型
items.summary_en: Magenta RealTime 2 introduces open and local live music models that run on-device, addressing latency and privacy concerns while enabling AI-assisted performance. The approach supports on-device inference and creative experimentation without cloud dependencies.
items.summary_zh: Magenta RealTime 2 引入开源的本地实时音乐模型，可在设备上运行，解决了延迟和隐私问题，同时支持 AI 辅助演出。此方法实现了本地推断，降低对云端依赖，促进创意实验。

items.title_en: The SLAX Scripting Language: An Alternate Syntax for XSLT
items.title_zh: SLAX 脚本语言：XSLT 的另一种语法
items.summary_en: SLAX offers a script-style syntax for XML transformations, offering a friendlier alternative to traditional XSLT. It aims to speed up XML processing and improve readability for developers.
items.summary_zh: SLAX 提供了一种脚本化的 XML 转换语法，作为传统 XSLT 的替代方案。设计目标是加速 XML 处理并提升开发者的可读性。

items.title_en: Show HN: Ideogram 4.0 – open-weight 9.3B text-to-image model
items.title_zh: Show HN：Ideogram 4.0——开源权重的 9.3B 文图模型
items.summary_en: Ideogram 4.0 releases open-weight 9.3B text-to-image model, advancing accessible, community-driven AI art generation. The open weights enable researchers and hobbyists to run and fine-tune the model locally, fostering experimentation and transparency.
items.summary_zh: Ideogram 4.0 发布开源权重的 9.3B 文图模型，推动了更易获取的 AI 艺术生成。开源权重使研究者和爱好者能够本地运行与微调模型，促进实验与透明度。

items.title_en: SDSU Wired Its Dorms with 1,300 AI Cameras Without Telling Students
items.title_zh: SDSU 未告知学生就把宿舍装设1,300台 AI 摄像头
items.summary_en: San Diego State University wired 1,300 AI cameras in dorms without notifying students, raising concerns about privacy, surveillance creep, and consent in campus life.
items.summary_zh: 未通知学生就将1,300台 AI 摄像头安装到宿舍，引发关于校园隐私、监控扩张和同意的问题。

items.title_en: Google just made you a search quality rater. You won't get paid
items.title_zh: 谷歌让你成为搜索质量评分员：你不会得到酬劳
items.summary_en: Google just made you a search quality rater. You won't get paid explains how Google recruits unpaid raters to help refine search quality signals. It raises questions about compensation, data labeling norms, and the living boundary between crowdsourcing and paid work.
items.summary_zh: 谷歌现在招募无薪的搜索质量评估员，让人类判断来微调排名信号。该计划带来规模化反馈的潜力，同时引发对报酬、公平性、数据标注流程及众包任务的关注。

items.title_en: Human-Like Neural Nets by Catapulting
items.title_zh: 通过跃升实现的类人神经网络
items.summary_en: Discusses how to push toward more human-like neural nets via targeted leaps in capability, through scaling, training dynamics, and architectural tweaks. It surveys promising approaches and early results, arguing that deliberate breakthroughs can yield more robust, human-like reasoning without a full model rewrite.
items.summary_zh: 探讨通过“跃升”式的办法让神经网络更具类人特征，可能涉及扩展规模、训练策略和结构调整等。文章梳理了若干方法及初步结果，认为在不全面重做模型的前提下进行有意的跃升也能带来更强的推理和鲁棒性。

items.title_en: Now Is the Best Time to Be a Duct Tape Engineer
items.title_zh: 现在是成为“胶带工程师”的最佳时机
items.summary_en: Now Is the Best Time to Be a Duct Tape Engineer argues that today's toolkit, from cheap parts to open hardware and rapid prototyping, enables engineers to ship ideas quickly with pragmatic tradeoffs. It champions resourcefulness, cross-disciplinary tinkering, and the value of low-cost, iterative solutions that accelerate innovation.
items.summary_zh: 文章认为当下的工程环境为快速原型开发提供了充足工具：廉价零件、开源工具和快速迭代让工程师能够用有限资源快速落地方案。强调务实、跨学科协作，以及低成本、可重复性的迭代解决方案在推动创新中的价值。

items.title_en: Launch HN: Rudus (YC P26) – AI for concrete contractors
items.title_zh: Show HN: Rudus（YC P26）– 为混凝土承包商打造的 AI
items.summary_en: Rudus, a YC P26 startup, offers AI-powered tools tailored for concrete contractors, likely addressing scheduling, material planning, and on-site optimization. The launch highlights practical, industry-specific AI adoption in construction.
items.summary_zh: Rudus 是 YC 第26期初创项目，为混凝土承包商提供面向行业的 AI 工具，聚焦排程、材料规划和现场优化等场景，凸显建筑行业对 AI 的实用化采纳。

items.title_en: Qwen3.7-Plus: Multimodal Agent Intelligence
items.title_zh: Qwen3.7-Plus：多模态代理智能
items.summary_en: Qwen3.7-Plus extends multimodal agent capabilities, enabling integrated reasoning across text and visuals, and stronger tool-use with potential for real-world tasks.
items.summary_zh: Qwen3.7-Plus 增强了多模态代理能力，实现文本与视觉信息的整合推理，并强化工具使用，具备应用于真实任务的潜力。

items.title_en: Show HN: DepsGuard – One command to harden NPM/pnpm/yarn/bun/uv configs
items.title_zh: DepsGuard：一条命令让 NPM/pnpm/yarn/bun/uv 配置变得更安全
items.summary_en: DepsGuard is a single command to harden configurations across npm, pnpm, yarn, bun, and uv, helping reduce configuration-related risk.
items.summary_zh: DepsGuard 提供单一命令，对 npm、pnpm、Yarn、Bun 和 uv 的配置进行加固，降低因配置造成的安全与依赖风险。

items.title_en: Rubin Tracks Skyscraper-Size Asteroids and Failed Supernovas
items.title_zh: Rubin 追踪摩天级小行星、失败的超新星与星际来客
items.summary_en: An in-depth look at Rubin's work mapping colossal solar system bodies, failed supernovae, and mysterious interstellar visitors. The feature underscores how large-scale surveys and careful data interpretation drive new insights and push telescope design.
items.summary_zh: 深入介绍 Rubin 在追踪巨型小行星、坍缩失败的超新星以及星际来客方面的研究。该报道凸显大规模观测和谨慎的数据解读如何带来新发现，并推动望远镜与观测策略的改进。

items.title_en: Two Ways to Draw Infinite Jest's Sierpinski Gasket
items.title_zh: 绘制 Infinite Jest 风格的谢尔宾斯基三角形的两种方法
items.summary_en: Two techniques to render a Sierpinski gasket tied to the Infinite Jest reference, likely contrasting recursive and iterative approaches and their performance. It provides practical patterns for fractal drawing.
items.summary_zh: 给出两种绘制与《Infinite Jest》相关的谢尔宾斯基三角形的技术路径，可能对比递归与迭代实现及性能。提供在图形或数学库中实现分形的实用思路。

items.title_en: Show HN: NoSuggest – Watch YouTube without the recommendation algorithm
items.title_zh: Show HN：NoSuggest — 在不使用推荐算法的情况下观看 YouTube
items.summary_en: NoSuggest lets you watch YouTube without the recommendation algorithm, giving users more control over what they watch. It raises questions about how discovery works and whether long-term viewing habits are healthier.
items.summary_zh: NoSuggest 让用户在观看 YouTube 时不受推荐算法影响，赋予更高的观看控制权。此举引发关于发现机制及长期观看习惯是否更健康的讨论。

items.title_en: At the Autograph Show
items.title_zh: 在签名会现场
items.summary_en: A personal vignette about the autograph show experience, exploring its culture and quirks.
items.summary_zh: 这是一篇关于参加签名会的个人随笔，探索其中的文化与趣味。

items.title_en: Yon – a topos-oriented language with a content-addressed lattice heap
items.title_zh: Yon——一个面向拓扑的语言，具备内容寻址的格堆
items.summary_en: Yon is a topos-inspired programming language featuring a content-addressed lattice heap, aiming for formal semantics and persistent data structures. The design hints at applications in distributed systems and rigorous reasoning about code. It’s a niche but intriguing approach for language theorists and systems researchers.
items.summary_zh: Yon 是一个受 topos 启发的编程语言，使用内容寻址的格堆，强调形式化语义和持久数据结构。其设计可能在分布式系统和对代码进行严格推理方面有潜在应用，对语言理论和系统研究者具有吸引力。

items.title_en: California’s university system went all in on AI, now it's tearing itself apart
items.title_zh: 加州大学系统全力拥抱 AI，如今内部矛盾激化
items.summary_en: California's public university system embraced AI aggressively, funding labs and integrating AI tools into curricula. But governance disputes, funding conflicts, and concerns about equity and job displacement have exposed deep tensions across campuses. The case study signals how large-scale AI adoption can collide with state politics and institutional culture.
items.summary_zh: 加州公立大学系统大力推动 AI，投资实验室并将 AI 工具融入课程。但治理、资金分配和就业影响等方面的分歧让校园内部出现紧张与冲突。这起案例凸显了大规模 AI 采用可能与州层面政治和制度文化产生冲突。

items.title_en: BQN: What Is a Primitive?
items.title_zh: BQN：什么是原始元素？
items.summary_en: Exploring primitives in BQN, an APL-inspired language, this piece clarifies basic data types and operations that underpin its compact, expressive syntax.
items.summary_zh: 解析基于 APL 风格的语言 BQN 中的原始概念，阐明构成其简洁、表达力强语法的基本数据类型与操作。

items.title_en: Book Dedications
items.title_zh: 书籍献辞
items.summary_en: A collection of author dedications.
items.summary_zh: 作者献辞的合集。

items.title_en: Iran Severely Damaged US Air Ops Center in Qatar Soon After War Began
items.title_zh: 伊朗在战争初期对卡塔尔美军空中作战指挥中心造成严重损害
items.summary_en: Iran Severely Damaged US Air Ops Center in Qatar Soon After War Began reports an attack that reportedly damaged the US Air Operations Center in Qatar early in the conflict.
items.summary_zh: 报道称在冲突初期，伊朗对位于卡塔尔的美国空军作战中心造成严重损害，凸显区域冲突对美军部署的影响。文章可能分析对作战能力、冗余与网络安全的潜在影响，以及后续应对措施。

items.title_en: I am giving up on VM Gaming
items.title_zh: 我放弃了 VM 游戏
items.summary_en: A personal take on moving away from VM-based gaming due to performance, latency, or compatibility concerns, arguing for native or cloud alternatives.
items.summary_zh: 作者放弃基于虚拟机的游戏体验，指出性能、延迟和兼容性等问题，并建议采用原生或云端的替代方案。

items.title_en: How Long Does It Take for a QQuickItem to Become Visible?
items.title_zh: QQuickItem 多长时间才能变得可见？
items.summary_en: A practical look into the visibility latency of QQuickItem in Qt Quick, covering render pipeline stages, scene graph initialization, and possible delays from effects or animations. The takeaway is how to diagnose and reduce startup latency for smoother UIs.
items.summary_zh: 本文聚焦 Qt Quick 中 QQuickItem 变为可见所需时间的实际影响因素，涵盖渲染管线、场景图初始化以及动画或效果带来的潜在延迟。核心在于诊断并降低启动时的延迟，从而提升界面的流畅度。

items.title_en: Key chemistry question answered, no quantum computer required
items.title_zh: 关键化学问题已解：无需量子计算机
items.summary_en: A chemistry problem previously thought to require quantum computers has been solved with classical methods, illustrating the ongoing practicality of traditional computational chemistry.
items.summary_zh: 一项被认为需要量子计算机的化学难题已通过经典计算方法得到解决，显示传统计算化学在某些领域仍具可行性。

items.title_en: There's no escaping it: an exploration of ANSI codes
items.title_zh: 无处遁形的 ANSI 代码：一探究竟
items.summary_en: An exploration of ANSI escape codes—the sequences used to color and format terminal output. It covers history, practical tricks, and how modern tools still rely on these codes, along with potential pitfalls for developers.
items.summary_zh: 本文带你走进 ANSI 转义码的世界，即终端中用来着色和格式化输出的序列。介绍了实现原理、能带来哪些实用效果，以及在现代应用中可能遇到的坑与边界条件。

items.title_en: Computex 2026: Are We Heading for the Agentic PC Era Yet?
items.title_zh: Computex 2026：我们真的进入代理型PC时代了吗？
items.summary_en: Computex 2026 scenes hint at a shift toward agentic PCs—hardware capable of autonomous AI-assisted tasks, propping up new software-hardware ecosystems. The story weighs hype against practical constraints like privacy, security, and developer tooling, exploring whether consumer PCs will become proactive assistants.
items.summary_zh: Computex 2026 的讨论暗示 PC 进入具代理能力的时代——具备自主执行任务的 AI 助手能力，催生新的软硬件生态。文章权衡热度与现实挑战，如隐私、安全与开发工具，探讨普通消费者的 PC 是否会变成主动的助手。

items.title_en: Europe's largest Copper Age tomb: children's bones show ancient health crisis
items.title_zh: 欧洲最大的铜器时代墓葬：儿童骨骼揭示古代健康危机
items.summary_en: Archaeologists report Europe's largest Copper Age tomb bears children's bones showing health stress, offering clues about diet, disease, and social structure in that era. It deepens our understanding of ancient health and mortality patterns.
items.summary_zh: 考古学家报道欧洲最大的铜器时代墓葬中儿童骨骼显示健康压力的迹象，揭示当时的饮食、疾病与社会结构等线索，深化了对古代健康与死亡模式的理解。

items.title_en: Ohbin – uv wrapper for installing tools from GitHub
items.title_zh: Ohbin：GitHub 工具安装的 uv 封装器
items.summary_en: Ohbin is a uv wrapper that simplifies installing tools from GitHub, making it easier to fetch and manage GitHub releases. It reflects a broader trend toward streamlined, scriptable tooling in the developer ecosystem and raises considerations around provenance and safety.
items.summary_zh: Ohbin 是一个用于从 GitHub 安装工具的 uv 封装器，使获取和管理 GitHub 发布变得更简单。它体现了开发者生态中对简化、可脚本化工具的趋势，同时也引发关于来源可靠性和安全性的讨论。

items.title_en: Vim Classic 8.3 Released
items.title_zh: Vim Classic 8.3 发布
items.summary_en: Vim Classic 8.3 adds stability, bug fixes, and improved compatibility for vintage Vim experiences. It signals ongoing maintenance for enthusiasts who prefer classic interfaces.
items.summary_zh: Vim Classic 8.3 版本带来稳定性提升、错误修复和对经典 Vim 体验的改进兼容，显示出对偏好传统界面的爱好者持续维护。

items.title_en: Man-Computer Symbiosis J. C. R. Licklider (1960)
items.title_zh: 人–机共生：J. C. R. 里克莱德（1960）
items.summary_en: J. C. R. Licklider's 1960 essay argued for a partnership between humans and computers, envisioning cooperative problem-solving and cumulative intelligence through networks. The concept underpins modern HCI and AI systems, shaping how we design interactive tech.
items.summary_zh: 1960 年，洛克利德提出了人机共生的设想，强调人和计算机携手协作、通过网络实现协同智能。该观点奠定了现代人机交互与人工智能系统的设计思路，影响至今。

items.title_en: Meta Keeps Delaying the Release of Its New AI Model to Developers
items.title_zh: Meta 继续推迟向开发者发布其新 AI 模型
items.summary_en: Meta is extending the timeline for developer access to its new AI model, signaling cautious rollout, risk management, and a strategic cadence in the competitive AI landscape. The delay underscores how access schemes shape ecosystems around large-language-model platforms.
items.summary_zh: Meta 延长新 AI 模型向开发者开放的时间表，显示出更谨慎的推出节奏、风险管理以及在竞争性 AI 生态中的策略性步伐。此举凸显了访问机制如何影响大模型生态。

items.title_en: Show HN: ABC Classic 100 Rankings visualised
items.title_zh: Show HN：ABC Classic 100 排名可视化
items.summary_en: The Show HN visualization of ABC Classic 100 rankings provides a compact, interactive view into classical music popularity across time or categories. It demonstrates accessible data visualization at scale.
items.summary_zh: Show HN 展示的 ABC Classic 100 排名可视化提供关于古典音乐人气随时间或类别变化的紧凑、可交互视图，展示了大规模数据可视化的可访问性。

items.title_en: Misguided Misstatements Continue to Dismantle Biomedical Research in the U.S.
items.title_zh: 错误言论持续削弱美国生物医学研究
items.summary_en: Editorial argues misguided statements are eroding biomedical research in the U.S., undermining funding, credibility, and policy-making. It calls for science-based communication and evidence-driven decision-making.
items.summary_zh: 文章指出错误导向的言论正在削弱美国生物医学研究的资助与公信力，影响政策制定。呼吁以科学证据为基础进行传播和决策。

items.title_en: Latent Agents: A Post-Training Procedure for Internalized Multi-Agent Debate
items.title_zh: Latent Agents：用于内部化多智能体辩论的后训练程序
items.summary_en: Latent Agents presents a post-training procedure to internalize multi-agent debate, enabling AI agents to simulate and reason through disagreements more effectively. The approach has implications for alignment and collective decision making.
items.summary_zh: Latent Agents 提出一种后训练流程，使多智能体辩论技能在模型内部化，提升协同推理与应对分歧的能力，或影响对齐与集体决策。

items.title_en: The Infosec Phrasebook
items.title_zh: 信息安全术语手册
items.summary_en: A compact lexicon of infosec terms with quick definitions and practical notes to help engineers communicate clearly about security.
items.summary_zh: 简短的信息安全术语词汇表，配以实用注释，帮助工程师更清晰地讨论安全话题。

items.title_en: The complete IPv4 address space, mapped
items.title_zh: 完整的 IPv4 地址空间映射
items.summary_en: A visualization of the entire IPv4 address space, showing allocation by region, usage patterns, and fragmentation across ISPs and endpoints. The map highlights the sparsity of address space and the distribution of addresses across ISPs and endpoints, underscoring IPv4 exhaustion and the importance of IPv6 adoption.
items.summary_zh: 对整个 IPv4 地址空间的可视化映射，揭示各区域、运营商的地址分配与使用模式，以及地址的碎片化情况。映射凸显 IPv4 的稀缺性与在运营商与端点间的分布，强调向 IPv6 过渡的重要性。

items.title_en: The Russian who invented semiconductors 25 years before the USA
items.title_zh: 在美国之前25年发明半导体的俄罗斯人
items.summary_en: A historical profile of a Russian innovator who contributed to semiconductor development a quarter-century before US breakthroughs, highlighting overlooked global contributions.
items.summary_zh: 介绍了一位在美国之前25年对半导体发展做出贡献的俄罗斯发明者，强调了全球贡献的被忽视历史。

items.title_en: Why are large language models so terrible at video games?
items.title_zh: 为什么大型语言模型在电子游戏中表现如此糟糕？
items.summary_en: LLMs struggle with action-heavy tasks due to lack of embodied feedback and motor control; the article examines why this mismatch occurs and what improvements might help LLMs play games better.
items.summary_zh: 大型语言模型在需要实时行动的电子游戏中表现不佳，原因在于缺乏具身经验和感知反馈。文章分析了这一错配的根源，以及可能让 LLMs 更擅长游戏的改进方向。

items.title_en: Writing Portable ARM64 Assembly (2023)
items.title_zh: Writing Portable ARM64 Assembly (2023)
items.summary_en: Writing Portable ARM64 Assembly (2023) explores how to craft ARM64 assembly that stays portable across Apple, Android, and Linux ecosystems. It covers ABI conventions, calling conventions, and pragmatic patterns to maintain compatibility on multiple platforms. A practical guide for low-level cross-platform code.
items.summary_zh: 《Writing Portable ARM64 Assembly (2023)》探讨如何编写在 Apple、Android、Linux 等平台间可移植的 ARM64 汇编。内容涵盖 ABI 与调用约定，以及在不同体系结构上保持兼容性的实用模式。

items.title_en: Texas is America Inc's new centre of gravity
items.title_zh: 德州成为美国企业的新核心区
items.summary_en: The Economist piece argues Texas has become a new anchor for corporate America, highlighting business-friendly policy, energy, and talent trends that draw companies from coastal regions. It analyzes macro implications for investment and supply chains.
items.summary_zh: 该篇经济学人文章认为德州已成为美国企业的新核心，强调友好的政策环境、能源优势与人才流动等因素吸引企业从沿海地区迁入，并分析对投资与供应链的宏观影响。

items.title_en: Show HN: Textile – A desktop app for weaving together bits of text
items.title_zh: Show HN：Textile——用于拼接文本片段的桌面应用
items.summary_en: Textile is a desktop app designed to weave together disparate text snippets into a coherent whole, aiding brainstorming and drafting workflows. It emphasizes a lightweight, local-first approach for organizing fragments of ideas. The app targets writers and developers seeking a tactile, offline text-crafting workflow.
items.summary_zh: Textile 是一款桌面应用，旨在把零散的文本片段拼接成一个连贯的整体，帮助头脑风暴与起草工作流。它强调轻量化、就地存储的文本组织方法，面向需要直观离线文本创作流程的作者与开发者。

items.title_en: Bias Compounds, Variance Washes Out
items.title_zh: 偏差叠加，方差被冲淡
items.summary_en: In certain data regimes, bias compounds as data grows while variance effects fade, challenging conventional bias-variance intuition.
items.summary_zh: 在某些数据情形下，随着数据量增加，偏差会叠加而方差效应却逐渐减弱，这对传统的偏差-方差观念构成挑战。文中讨论对评估和数据收集策略的影响。

items.title_en: SpaceX's IPO is a disaster waiting to happen for your pension fund
items.title_zh: SpaceX 的上市对养老金基金而言是潜在灾难
items.summary_en: Analyses warn SpaceX's ambitious debt load and earnings outlook could make an IPO risky for pension funds and other long-horizon investors. It highlights the tension between ambitious, long-term projects and traditional risk budgets.
items.summary_zh: 分析指出 SpaceX 的高负债与盈利前景让上市对养老金基金等长期投资者存在潜在风险，揭示雄心勃勃的项目与传统风险预算之间的矛盾。

items.title_en: P/E Tells You the Price. Reality Gap Tells You the Delusion
items.title_zh: 市盈率给出价格，但现实缺口揭示其错觉
items.summary_en: A post critiques high P/E valuations versus the reality gap between expectations and actual performance, warning that prices may reflect hype rather than fundamentals. It offers heuristics to avoid overpaying for growth.
items.summary_zh: 本文批评高市盈率与现实之间的差距，警告价格可能反映热度而非基本面，并提供避免为增长过度支付的判断准绳。

items.title_en: External Clock Generation on RTX 50 Series
items.title_zh: RTX 50 系列的外部时钟源生成
items.summary_en: RTX 50 Series introduces external clock generation, enabling synchronization with external signals for precision timing, overclocking, and potential new attack surfaces.
items.summary_zh: RTX 50 系列引入外部时钟源生成，允许与外部信号同步，可能影响超频、稳定性与安全性。

items.title_en: The Frame Problem (2004)
items.title_zh: 框架问题（2004）
items.summary_en: An overview of the Frame Problem in AI, discussing how agents reason about what remains unchanged after actions.
items.summary_zh: 对 AI 框架问题的概述，讨论在世界因行动而改变时，代理如何推理哪些内容保持不变。

items.title_en: KL Zero: KL divergence intuition game
items.title_zh: KL Zero：KL 散度直觉游戏
items.summary_en: KL Zero provides an intuitive, interactive take on KL divergence, helping readers understand how information loss behaves when comparing probability distributions.
items.summary_zh: KL Zero 提供对 KL 散度的直观、互动的解读，帮助读者理解在比较概率分布时信息损失的表现。

items.title_en: REST3D: Reconstructing Physically Stable 3D Scenes from a Single Image
items.title_zh: REST3D：从单幅图像重建物理稳定的三维场景
items.summary_en: REST3D proposes reconstructing physically stable 3D scenes from a single image, blending computer vision with physical plausibility. This could improve AR/VR, robotics perception, and scene understanding with limited data.
items.summary_zh: REST3D 提出基于单张图片重建物理稳定的三维场景，将计算机视觉与物理一致性结合，为在有限数据下的 AR/VR、机器人感知与场景理解带来潜在提升。

items.title_en: Thomas Mann: Goethe Heartened by Panama (As Suez for English, or Danube-Rhine)
items.title_zh: 托马斯·曼：巴拿马让歌德感到欣慰（如同苏伊士对英语，或多瑙-莱茵之路）
items.summary_en: A literary reflection invoking Goethe to explore Panama, drawing parallels with Suez and Danube–Rhine routes to discuss cultural exchange and engineering feats.
items.summary_zh: 一篇文学反思，借用歌德的视角探讨巴拿马运河，并将其与苏伊士、但得-莱茵之路进行比较，讨论文化交流与工程成就。

items.title_en: Sakana AI's Recursive Self-Improvement (RSI) Lab
items.title_zh: Sakana AI 的 RSI 实验室
items.summary_en: Sakana AI's Recursive Self-Improvement Lab explores the idea of AI systems improving themselves iteratively. The concept raises questions about control, safety, and governance as systems become more autonomous.
items.summary_zh: Sakana AI 的递归自我提升实验室探讨 AI 系统自我改进的循环能力。这一理念引发关于控制、安全与治理的讨论，尤其在系统日益自主时。

items.title_en: Iran war drains US oil stocks to lowest level since 2004
items.title_zh: 伊朗战争令美国石油储备降至2004年以来的最低水平
items.summary_en: Geopolitical tension with Iran is draining U.S. oil stocks to the lowest level since 2004, tightening supply and pushing prices higher. The shift affects energy costs, inflation, and the cost structure of tech hardware, data centers, and other energy-intensive operations.
items.summary_zh: 与伊朗的地缘政治紧张局势使美国的石油库存降至2004年以来的最低水平，供应趋紧、价格上涨。此变化影响能源成本、通胀，以及对科技硬件、数据中心等高耗能行业的成本结构。

items.title_en: Show HN: Rscrypto, pure-Rust crypto with industry leading public benches
items.title_zh: Show HN: Rscrypto，纯 Rust 的密码学库，具行业领先的公开基准
items.summary_en: Rscrypto is a pure-Rust cryptography library with public benchmarks, aiming for transparent, verifiable performance. The project appeals to security-conscious developers who want reliable crypto in Rust without vendor-specific optimizations.
items.summary_zh: Rscrypto 是一个纯 Rust 的密码学库，提供公开的基准以实现透明可核验的性能。该项目面向重视安全性的开发者，追求在 Rust 中获得可靠且可验证的加密功能。

items.title_en: A Visual Guide to Gemma 4 12B
items.title_zh: Gemma 4 12B 的可视化指南
items.summary_en: Gemma 4 12B is a 12B-parameter model. A visual guide explains its architecture, training data, capabilities, and limitations using diagrams and charts. It helps readers understand how the model behaves and highlights safety and deployment considerations.
items.summary_zh: Gemma 4 12B 是一个 12B 参数的模型，可视化指南通过图示解释其架构、训练数据、能力与局限性，便于读者理解模型的工作机制。内容有助于评估其安全性与落地应用时的风险点。

items.title_en: Communities of Not
items.title_zh: Not 的社区
items.summary_en: A thoughtful essay on 'Communities of Not', exploring how groups organize around counter-narratives in tech culture and what that means for collaboration and trust.
items.summary_zh: 《Not 的社区》一文探讨科技文化中以“否定/否认”为共同体核心的社群现象，以及这对协作与信任的影响。

items.title_en: Neocities domain suspended by Namecheap for unrelated court case
items.title_zh: Namecheap 暂停 Neocities 域名服务因涉及无关法院案
items.summary_en: Neocities domain service suspended by Namecheap due to an unrelated court case, illustrating how legal actions can disrupt small, community-run sites. The incident highlights risks for hobbyist hosting platforms.
items.summary_zh: Namecheap 因涉及无关的法庭案件暂停了 Neocities 的域名服务，显示法律纠纷对小型社区托管站点的潜在影响与风险。

items.title_en: Programmers Aren't People
items.title_zh: 程序员不是人吗
items.summary_en: An essay provocatively argues about dehumanizing stereotypes or workplace dynamics in programming culture, urging empathy and better norms.
items.summary_zh: 这篇文章用挑衅口吻讨论编程文化中的去人性化刻板印象和职场规范，呼吁提升同理心与更好的行业风气。
